tZh: Skywork Open Reasoner 1 技术报告
sEn: Skywork-OR1 achieves significant reasoning gains via RL, with 32B model improving from 57.8% to 72.8% on AIME24, AIME25, and LiveCodeBench.
sZh: Skywork-OR1 通过强化学习显著提升推理能力，32B 模型在 AIME24、AIME25 和 LiveCodeBench 上平均准确率从 57.8% 提升至 72.8%。
absEn: The success of DeepSeek-R1 underscores the significant role of reinforcement learning (RL) in enhancing the reasoning capabilities of large language models (LLMs). In this work, we present Skywork-OR1, an effective and scalable RL implementation for long Chain-of-Thought (CoT) models. Building on the DeepSeek-R1-Distill model series, our RL approach achieves notable performance gains, increasing average accuracy across AIME24, AIME25, and LiveCodeBench from 57.8% to 72.8% (+15.0%) for the 32B model and from 43.6% to 57.5% (+13.9%) for the 7B model. Our Skywork-OR1-32B model surpasses both DeepSeek-R1 and Qwen3-32B on the AIME24 and AIME25 benchmarks, while achieving comparable results on LiveCodeBench. The Skywork-OR1-7B and Skywork-OR1-Math-7B models demonstrate competitive reasoning capabilities among models of similar size. We perform comprehensive ablation studies on the core components of our training pipeline to validate their effectiveness. Additionally, we thoroughly investigate the phenomenon of entropy collapse, identify key factors affecting entropy dynamics, and demonstrate that mitigating premature entropy collapse is critical for improved test performance. To support community research, we fully open-source our model weights, training code, and training datasets.
absZh: DeepSeek-R1 的成功凸显了强化学习在增强大语言模型推理能力中的重要作用。本文介绍了 Skywork-OR1，一种针对长思维链模型的高效可扩展强化学习实现。基于 DeepSeek-R1-Distill 模型系列，我们的强化学习方法取得了显著性能提升：32B 模型在 AIME24、AIME25 和 LiveCodeBench 上的平均准确率从 57.8% 提升至 72.8%（+15.0%），7B 模型从 43.6% 提升至 57.5%（+13.9%）。我们的 Skywork-OR1-32B 模型在 AIME24 和 AIME25 基准上超越了 DeepSeek-R1 和 Qwen3-32B，同时在 LiveCodeBench 上取得了可比结果。Skywork-OR1-7B 和 Skywork-OR1-Math-7B 模型在相似规模模型中展现了有竞争力的推理能力。我们对训练流程的核心组件进行了全面消融研究以验证其有效性。此外，我们深入研究了熵崩溃现象，识别了影响熵动态的关键因素，并证明缓解过早熵崩溃对于提升测试性能至关重要。为支持社区研究，我们完全开源了模型权重、训练代码和训练数据集。

contrib.en: Proposes MAGIC, a multi-stage adaptive entropy scheduling framework for GRPO, improving long CoT reasoning.
contrib.zh: 提出MAGIC框架，一种多阶段自适应熵调度的GRPO方法，提升长思维链推理能力。

contrib.en: Achieves 15.0% and 13.9% average accuracy gains on 32B and 7B models over AIME24, AIME25, and LiveCodeBench.
contrib.zh: 在32B和7B模型上，AIME24、AIME25和LiveCodeBench平均准确率分别提升15.0%和13.9%。

contrib.en: Identifies premature entropy collapse as a key factor limiting RL performance and proposes adaptive entropy control.
contrib.zh: 发现过早熵坍塌是限制强化学习性能的关键因素，并提出自适应熵控制方法。

contrib.en: Conducts comprehensive ablation studies on data, training strategy, and loss components to validate effectiveness.
contrib.zh: 对数据、训练策略和损失组件进行全面的消融研究，验证其有效性。

contrib.en: Open-sources model weights, training code, and datasets to support community research.
contrib.zh: 开源模型权重、训练代码和数据集，支持社区研究。

contrib.en: Demonstrates that on-policy updates and high-temperature sampling mitigate entropy collapse and improve generalization.
contrib.zh: 证明在线策略更新和高温度采样可缓解熵坍塌并提升泛化能力。

limits.en: Experiments are limited to DeepSeek-R1-Distill model series and may not generalize to other architectures.
limits.zh: 实验仅限于DeepSeek-R1-Distill模型系列，可能不适用于其他架构。

limits.en: Code sandbox does not handle non-deterministic outputs or multiple valid answers for the same input.
limits.zh: 代码沙箱无法处理非确定性输出或同一输入的多个有效答案。

limits.en: Adaptive entropy control may become unstable when the number of SGD steps per training step is large.
limits.zh: 当每训练步的SGD步数较大时，自适应熵控制可能变得不稳定。

limits.en: The study focuses on math and code domains; effectiveness in other domains (e.g., reasoning, NLP) is not evaluated.
limits.zh: 研究聚焦数学和代码领域，未评估在其他领域（如推理、自然语言处理）的有效性。

limits.en: Training resource allocation analysis assumes synchronous training; asynchronous settings may yield different results.
limits.zh: 训练资源分配分析假设同步训练，异步设置可能产生不同结果。

items.en: The success of DeepSeek-R1 underscores the significant role of reinforcement learning (RL) in enhancing the reasoning capabilities of large language models (LLMs). In this work, we present Skywork-OR1, an effective and scalable RL implementation for long Chain-of-Thought (CoT) models. Building on the DeepSeek-R1-Distill model series, our RL approach achieves notable performance gains, increasing average accuracy across AIME24, AIME25, and LiveCodeBench from 57.8% to 72.8% (+15.0%) for the 32B model and from 43.6% to 57.5% (+13.9%) for the 7B model. Our Skywork-OR1-32B model surpasses both DeepSeek-R1 and Qwen3-32B on the AIME24 and AIME25 benchmarks, while achieving comparable results on LiveCodeBench. The Skywork-OR1-7B and Skywork-OR1-Math-7B models demonstrate competitive reasoning capabilities among models of similar size. We perform comprehensive ablation studies on the core components of our training pipeline to validate their effectiveness. Additionally, we thoroughly investigate the phenomenon of entropy collapse, identify key factors affecting entropy dynamics, and demonstrate that mitigating premature entropy collapse is critical for improved test performance. To support community research, we fully open-source our model weights, training code, and training datasets.
items.zh: DeepSeek-R1的成功凸显了强化学习在提升大语言模型推理能力中的重要作用。本文中，我们提出了Skywork-OR1，一种针对长思维链模型的有效且可扩展的强化学习实现。基于DeepSeek-R1-Distill模型系列，我们的强化学习方法取得了显著的性能提升，将32B模型在AIME24、AIME25和LiveCodeBench上的平均准确率从57.8%提升至72.8%（+15.0%），7B模型从43.6%提升至57.5%（+13.9%）。我们的Skywork-OR1-32B模型在AIME24和AIME25基准上超越了DeepSeek-R1和Qwen3-32B，同时在LiveCodeBench上取得了可比的结果。Skywork-OR1-7B和Skywork-OR1-Math-7B模型在相似规模的模型中展示了有竞争力的推理能力。我们对训练流程的核心组件进行了全面的消融研究，以验证其有效性。此外，我们深入研究了熵崩溃现象，识别了影响熵动态的关键因素，并证明了缓解过早熵崩溃对于提升测试性能至关重要。为支持社区研究，我们完全开源了模型权重、训练代码和训练数据集。

items.en: In recent months, post-training techniques based on reinforcement learning (RL) have achieved groundbreaking success in enhancing the reasoning capabilities of large language models (LLMs). Representative models such as OpenAI-o1 [9], DeepSeek-R1 [6], and Kimi-K1.5 [24] demonstrate RL’s remarkable ability to significantly improve performance in mathematics and coding. While prior RL approaches have primarily relied on Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) or Process Reward Models (PRMs) to improve reasoning over supervised fine-tuning (SFT) models, the success of DeepSeek-R1 demonstrates conclusively that online RL with a simple rule-based reward is sufficient to substantially enhance the reasoning capabilities of base models.
items.zh: 近几个月来，基于强化学习的后训练技术在增强大语言模型推理能力方面取得了突破性成功。代表性模型如OpenAI-o1 [9]、DeepSeek-R1 [6]和Kimi-K1.5 [24]展示了强化学习在数学和编码领域显著提升性能的卓越能力。虽然先前的强化学习方法主要依赖蒙特卡洛树搜索或过程奖励模型来提升监督微调模型的推理能力，但DeepSeek-R1的成功明确表明，使用简单基于规则的奖励的在线强化学习足以大幅提升基础模型的推理能力。

items.en: As model capabilities continue to advance, Chains-of-Thought (CoT) have grown progressively longer. For example, the DeepSeek-R1-Distill model series [6] generates CoT sequences averaging over 10K tokens on the AIME24 benchmark, significantly surpassing earlier popular SFT models such as the Qwen 2.5 model series [33] and the Llama 3.1 model series [5]. Despite several reproduction efforts (e.g., Logic-RL [31], Open-Reasoner-Zero [8], DAPO [34], VAPO [35]) following the success of DeepSeek-R1, most have focused on applying RL to base models rather than to long CoT models that have already undergone SFT. As a result, it remains unclear how to improve the reasoning abilities of long CoT models using RL in an efficient and scalable manner. While recent works such as DeepScaleR [17], Light-R1 [28], and DeepCoder [16] have made preliminary progress toward efficient RL optimization for long CoT models, their analyses do not systematically disentangle the contributions of distinct algorithmic components during RL training.
items.zh: 随着模型能力的持续进步，思维链变得越来越长。例如，DeepSeek-R1-Distill模型系列[6]在AIME24基准上生成的思维链序列平均超过10K个词元，显著超越了早期流行的监督微调模型如Qwen 2.5模型系列[33]和Llama 3.1模型系列[5]。尽管在DeepSeek-R1成功之后有多个复现工作（如Logic-RL [31]、Open-Reasoner-Zero [8]、DAPO [34]、VAPO [35]），但大多数集中在将强化学习应用于基础模型，而非已经过监督微调的长思维链模型。因此，如何以高效且可扩展的方式使用强化学习提升长思维链模型的推理能力仍不清楚。虽然近期工作如DeepScaleR [17]、Light-R1 [28]和DeepCoder [16]在长思维链模型的高效强化学习优化方面取得了初步进展，但它们的分析并未系统性地厘清强化学习训练中不同算法组件的贡献。

items.en: In this work, we introduce Skywork Open Reasoner 1 (abbreviated as Skywork-OR1 throughout the report), an efficient and scalable RL recipe for long CoT models. Our experiments are based on the DeepSeek-R1-Distill model series and open-source datasets with rigorous preprocessing and filtering. As shown in Figure 1 and Table 13, the Skywork-OR1 model series achieves significant performance improvements over base models, demonstrating the effectiveness of our RL implementation. Specifically, Skywork-OR1-32B achieves scores of 82.2 on AIME24, 73.3 on AIME25, and 63.0 on LiveCodeBench[10] (2024-08 - 2025-02), outperforming DeepSeek-R1 and Qwen3-32B in the math domain. Skywork-OR1-7B achieves 70.2 on AIME24, 54.6 on AIME25, and 47.6 on LiveCodeBench, exhibiting competitive performance relative to similarly sized models in both math and coding tasks. Our previously released model, Skywork-OR1-Math-7B, also delivers strong performance among similarly sized models, scoring 69.8 on AIME24, 52.3 on AIME25, and 43.6 on LiveCodeBench. We conducted exhaustive ablation experiments to validate the effectiveness of the core components in the training pipeline.
items.zh: 本文中，我们介绍了Skywork Open Reasoner 1（本文中简称Skywork-OR1），一种针对长思维链模型的高效且可扩展的强化学习方案。我们的实验基于DeepSeek-R1-Distill模型系列和经过严格预处理与过滤的开源数据集。如图1和表13所示，Skywork-OR1模型系列在基础模型上取得了显著的性能提升，证明了我们强化学习实现的有效性。具体来说，Skywork-OR1-32B在AIME24上达到82.2分，AIME25上73.3分，LiveCodeBench[10]（2024-08至2025-02）上63.0分，在数学领域超越了DeepSeek-R1和Qwen3-32B。Skywork-OR1-7B在AIME24上达到70.2分，AIME25上54.6分，LiveCodeBench上47.6分，在数学和编码任务中展现出与相似规模模型竞争的性能。我们之前发布的模型Skywork-OR1-Math-7B在相似规模模型中也表现出强劲性能，在AIME24上得分为69.8，AIME25上52.3，LiveCodeBench上43.6。我们进行了详尽的消融实验，以验证训练流程中核心组件的有效性。

items.en: Balancing exploration and exploitation is crucial in RL training [22]. We conducted a comprehensive study on premature entropy collapse, a phenomenon associated with excessive exploitation, and found that mitigating premature entropy collapse is essential for achieving better test performance. Through exhaustive ablation experiments, we identified key factors that influence entropy dynamics.
items.zh: 在强化学习训练中，平衡探索与利用至关重要[22]。我们对过早熵崩溃（一种与过度利用相关的现象）进行了全面研究，发现缓解过早熵崩溃对于实现更好的测试性能至关重要。通过详尽的消融实验，我们识别了影响熵动态的关键因素。

items.en: To ensure full reproducibility and support ongoing research within the LLM community, we release all of our training resources, including source code***https://github.com/SkyworkAI/Skywork-OR1, the post-training dataset†††https://huggingface.co/datasets/Skywork/Skywork-OR1-RL-Data, and model weights‡‡‡https://huggingface.co/Skywork/Skywork-OR1-7B §§§https://huggingface.co/Skywork/Skywork-OR1-32B. Furthermore, we conducted extensive ablation studies across both data and algorithmic dimensions to elucidate effective RL implementations for long CoT models. As a follow-up to our previously released Notion blog post [7], we present this more detailed technical report, with our key findings summarized as follows:
items.zh: 为确保完全可复现并支持大语言模型社区的持续研究，我们发布了所有训练资源，包括源代码***https://github.com/SkyworkAI/Skywork-OR1、后训练数据集†††https://huggingface.co/datasets/Skywork/Skywork-OR1-RL-Data和模型权重‡‡‡https://huggingface.co/Skywork/Skywork-OR1-7B §§§https://huggingface.co/Skywork/Skywork-OR1-32B。此外，我们在数据和算法两个维度进行了广泛的消融研究，以阐明长思维链模型的有效强化学习实现。作为我们之前发布的Notion博客文章[7]的后续，我们呈现了这份更详细的技术报告，主要发现总结如下：

items.en: In Section 2, we introduce the preliminaries of several important policy optimization methods in RL. Section 3 elaborates on our training pipeline, including comprehensive ablation studies that validate the effectiveness of its core components. A systematic investigation of entropy collapse is presented in Section 4, demonstrating that mitigating premature policy convergence is critical in RL training for enhancing exploration and achieving better test performance. We discuss training resource allocation in Section 5. The implementation details of our training data preparation and rule-based reward are provided in Sections 6 and 7. Finally, Section 8 presents a comprehensive description of the training and evaluation details for our three released models: Skywork-OR1-Math-7B, Skywork-OR1-7B, and Skywork-OR1-32B.
items.zh: 第2节介绍了强化学习中几种重要策略优化方法的基础知识。第3节详细阐述了我们的训练流程，包括验证其核心组件有效性的全面消融研究。第4节对熵崩溃进行了系统研究，证明缓解过早策略收敛对于在强化学习训练中增强探索和实现更好测试性能至关重要。我们在第5节讨论了训练资源分配。第6节和第7节提供了训练数据准备和基于规则奖励的实现细节。最后，第8节全面描述了三个发布模型（Skywork-OR1-Math-7B、Skywork-OR1-7B和Skywork-OR1-32B）的训练和评估细节。

items.en: We employ a training pipeline built upon a modified version of GRPO [21], referred to as Multi-stage Adaptive entropy scheduling for GRPO In Convergence (MAGIC). In the following sections, we first introduce the recipe of MAGIC and then analyze the effectiveness of each of its components.
items.zh: 我们采用基于 GRPO [21] 修改版本的训练流程，称为多阶段自适应熵调度 GRPO 收敛（MAGIC）。在以下章节中，我们首先介绍 MAGIC 的方案，然后分析其每个组件的有效性。

items.en: In the following, we present the MAGIC framework by detailing its components in terms of Data Collection, Training Strategy, and Loss Function.
items.zh: 下面，我们通过详细说明 MAGIC 框架在数据收集、训练策略和损失函数方面的组件来介绍它。

items.en: To ensure the quality of queries during post-training, we construct the initial dataset through stringent data preparation, as described in Section 6, and adopt more accurate verifiers to provide reward signals, as outlined in Section 7. Additionally, we employ the following strategies to further improve sample efficiency:
items.zh: 为确保后训练期间查询的质量，我们通过严格的数据准备构建初始数据集（如第 6 节所述），并采用更准确的验证器提供奖励信号（如第 7 节所述）。此外，我们采用以下策略进一步提高样本效率：

items.en: Offline and Online Filtering. We apply data filtering both before and during training. Prior to training, we remove prompts with base model correctness rates of 1 (fully correct) or 0 (completely incorrect). During training, at the beginning of each stage, we also discard training prompts for which the actor model achieved correctness of 1 in the previous stage. This dynamic online filtering mechanism ensures that the actor model is consistently trained on challenging problems at each stage.
items.zh: 离线和在线过滤。我们在训练前和训练中都应用数据过滤。训练前，我们移除基础模型正确率为 1（完全正确）或 0（完全错误）的提示。训练期间，在每个阶段开始时，我们还丢弃上一阶段演员模型正确率为 1 的训练提示。这种动态在线过滤机制确保演员模型在每个阶段都持续在具有挑战性的问题上进行训练。

items.en: Rejection Sampling. Responses in the zero-advantage group (as defined by Equation (2.5)) do not contribute to the policy loss but may influence the KL loss or entropy loss, potentially leading to a more unstable training process due to the implicitly increased relative weight of these losses. To mitigate this issue, our training batches include only groups with non-zero advantages; specifically, the samples of prompt xix_{i} are filtered out if i∉𝒯~ki\notin\tilde{\mathcal{T}}_{k}, where
items.zh: 拒绝采样。零优势组（如公式 (2.5) 所定义）中的响应不贡献策略损失，但可能影响 KL 损失或熵损失，由于这些损失的相对权重隐式增加，可能导致训练过程更不稳定。为缓解此问题，我们的训练批次仅包含非零优势的组；具体来说，如果 i∉𝒯̃_k，则过滤掉提示 x_i 的样本，其中

items.en: We made the following refinements to the training strategy of vanilla GRPO:
items.zh: 我们对原始 GRPO 的训练策略进行了以下改进：

items.en: Multi-Stage Training. Inspired by DeepScaleR [17], we progressively increase the context length TT and divide the training process into multiple stages. We found that multi-stage training significantly reduces computational costs while preserving scalability, as supported by the evidence presented in Section 3.2.2.
items.zh: 多阶段训练。受 DeepScaleR [17] 启发，我们逐步增加上下文长度 T 并将训练过程分为多个阶段。我们发现多阶段训练显著降低了计算成本，同时保持了可扩展性，第 3.2.2 节的证据支持了这一点。

items.en: Advantage Mask for Truncated Responses. To address potential noise in training signals when outcomes cannot be derived from truncated responses – since assigning negative advantages in such cases may introduce bias – we experimented with an advantage mask during the early stages of multi-stage training, when many responses are truncated. However, as shown in Section 3.2.3, penalizing truncated responses does not hinder later-stage improvements and enhances token efficiency. Based on these results, we do not employ any advantage mask strategy in our training pipeline.
items.zh: 截断响应的优势掩码。为解决当无法从截断响应中得出结果时训练信号中可能存在的噪声问题（因为在这种情况下分配负优势可能引入偏差），我们在多阶段训练的早期阶段（此时许多响应被截断）尝试了优势掩码。然而，如第 3.2.3 节所示，惩罚截断响应不会阻碍后期改进，并提高了 token 效率。基于这些结果，我们在训练流程中未使用任何优势掩码策略。

items.en: High-Temperature Sampling. We set the rollout temperature to τ=1\tau=1 to enhance the model’s exploration capability and improve learning plasticity. This decision was motivated by our observation that the sampling policy either immediately enters (in the case of math data) or quickly transitions into (in the case of code data) a low-entropy state when using a smaller sampling temperature (e.g., τ=0.6\tau=0.6). See Section 3.2.4 for further details.
items.zh: 高温采样。我们将 rollout 温度设置为 τ=1，以增强模型的探索能力并提高学习可塑性。这一决定源于我们的观察：当使用较小的采样温度（例如 τ=0.6）时，采样策略要么立即进入（对于数学数据）要么快速过渡到（对于代码数据）低熵状态。详见第 3.2.4 节。

items.en: On-Policy Training. We adopted on-policy training for Skywork-OR1-7B and Skywork-OR1-32B, as we found that on-policy updates significantly slow entropy collapse and lead to higher test performance. See Section 4 for our detailed findings on entropy collapse. In contrast, Skywork-OR1-Math-7B was trained with two gradient steps per training step (and was therefore not strictly on-policy). This setup preceded our complete understanding of the relationship between off-policy updates and premature entropy collapse. Nevertheless, adaptive entropy control (Section 3.2.5) effectively mitigated collapse, allowing the model to achieve strong performance.
items.zh: 在策略训练。我们对 Skywork-OR1-7B 和 Skywork-OR1-32B 采用了在策略训练，因为我们发现在策略更新显著减缓了熵崩溃并导致更高的测试性能。关于熵崩溃的详细发现见第 4 节。相比之下，Skywork-OR1-Math-7B 每个训练步进行了两个梯度步（因此并非严格在策略）。这种设置发生在我们完全理解离策略更新与过早熵崩溃之间的关系之前。尽管如此，自适应熵控制（第 3.2.5 节）有效缓解了崩溃，使模型获得了强劲性能。

items.en: Adaptive Entropy Control. To preserve the model’s exploration capability and maintain high learning plasticity, it is common to include an additional entropy loss to prevent entropy collapse. An appropriately weighted entropy loss can enhance generalization. However, our experiments show that selecting a suitable coefficient in advance is often challenging, as the entropy loss is highly sensitive to both the coefficient and the training data. To address this, we introduce an additional hyperparameter, tgt-ent, representing the target entropy. This hyperparameter dynamically adjusts the coefficient αk\alpha_{k} based on the difference between the current entropy and the target entropy, ensuring that the current entropy remains lower-bounded by tgt-ent. See Section 3.2.5 for more details.
items.zh: 自适应熵控制。为保持模型的探索能力和高学习可塑性，通常包含额外的熵损失以防止熵崩溃。适当加权的熵损失可以增强泛化能力。然而，我们的实验表明，预先选择合适的系数通常具有挑战性，因为熵损失对系数和训练数据都非常敏感。为解决此问题，我们引入一个额外的超参数 tgt-ent，表示目标熵。该超参数根据当前熵与目标熵之间的差异动态调整系数 α_k，确保当前熵保持以 tgt-ent 为下界。详见第 3.2.5 节。

items.en: No KL Loss. We found that including a KL loss term hinders performance gains, particularly in the later stages of multi-stage training. Therefore, we omit the KL loss from our training recipe. See Section 3.2.6 for further discussion.
items.zh: 无 KL 损失。我们发现包含 KL 损失项会阻碍性能提升，尤其是在多阶段训练的后期阶段。因此，我们从训练方案中省略了 KL 损失。详见第 3.2.6 节。

items.en: In this section, we present results from extensive experiments conducted to examine how various components of our MAGIC recipe influence the performance improvement of reinforcement learning during post-training.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们展示了大量实验的结果，以检验 MAGIC 方案的各种组件如何影响后训练期间强化学习的性能提升。

items.en: In our formal training recipe, we include additional hard problems filtered from NuminaMath-1.5 [13] to construct our final data mixture. We conduct the following ablation study to demonstrate the effectiveness of this design choice. We primarily compare against DeepScaleR’s data mixture [17], as existing models trained on it have shown strong performance.
items.zh: 在我们的正式训练方案中，我们包含了从 NuminaMath-1.5 [13] 中过滤出的额外难题，以构建最终的数据混合。我们进行以下消融研究以证明这一设计选择的有效性。我们主要与 DeepScaleR 的数据混合 [17] 进行比较，因为基于该混合训练的现有模型已显示出强劲性能。

items.en: Although the DeepScaleR dataset performs well with smaller model variants, we observed a slight initial improvement on AIME24. However, performance degraded sharply after 300 training steps, eventually returning to the same accuracy as before training. Additionally, in Figure LABEL:fig:data_mixture_2, we test our data mixture combined with an extra subset obtained via a less stringent verification procedure. This extra subset contains hard problems from NuminaMath-1.5 that were previously excluded due to potential mismatches between extracted and provided solutions. We find that the performance difference between the two mixtures is negligible within the first 900 steps. The version including the extra subset exhibits slightly slower early progress, possibly due to noise in the provided answers. We hypothesize that RL training is robust to small amounts of ground truth noise, consistent with findings in [36]. Therefore, we adopt the default data composition described in Section 6 for all subsequent exploration experiments.
items.zh: 尽管 DeepScaleR 数据集在较小的模型变体上表现良好，但我们在 AIME24 上观察到轻微的初始改进。然而，在 300 个训练步后性能急剧下降，最终恢复到训练前的相同准确率。此外，在图 LABEL:fig:data_mixture_2 中，我们测试了我们的数据混合与通过较不严格的验证程序获得的额外子集的组合。该额外子集包含来自 NuminaMath-1.5 的难题，这些难题之前因提取的解决方案与提供的解决方案之间可能存在不匹配而被排除。我们发现，在前 900 步内，两种混合之间的性能差异可以忽略不计。包含额外子集的版本早期进展稍慢，可能是由于提供的答案中存在噪声。我们假设 RL 训练对少量真实噪声具有鲁棒性，这与 [36] 中的发现一致。因此，我们在所有后续探索实验中采用第 6 节中描述的默认数据组成。

items.en: One of the major challenges in optimizing long Chain-of-Thought (CoT) models with RL is managing excessively long outputs, which can lead to slow convergence and high training variance. Inspired by DeepScaleR [17], we incorporated multi-stage training in all our released models to improve training efficiency. Specifically, we used a shorter context length TT in the initial stages. Once the model’s performance converged, we increased TT in the subsequent stage. This approach led to significant performance improvements on benchmarks while also enhancing training efficiency.
items.zh: 使用强化学习优化长思维链（CoT）模型的主要挑战之一是管理过长的输出，这会导致收敛缓慢和高训练方差。受DeepScaleR [17]启发，我们在所有发布的模型中采用了多阶段训练以提高训练效率。具体来说，我们在初始阶段使用较短的上下文长度TT。当模型性能收敛后，我们在后续阶段增加TT。这种方法在基准测试上带来了显著的性能提升，同时提高了训练效率。

items.en: Same Improvement, Higher Efficiency. To demonstrate the effectiveness of multi-stage training, we conducted two experiments based on DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B with different schedules for TT:
items.zh: 相同改进，更高效率。为了展示多阶段训练的有效性，我们基于DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B进行了两项实验，采用不同的TT调度：

items.en: Improving Token Efficiency While Preserving Scaling Potential. Truncated responses are labeled as negative samples in RL training because they lack final answers. A potential concern with multi-stage training is that using short context windows may bias the model toward generating shorter responses, potentially limiting its exploratory capacity and reducing its ability to solve complex problems. Our findings demonstrate that multi-stage training not only improves token efficiency in the initial stage but also preserves scaling ability. In Figure LABEL:fig:token_efficiency, we observe that training with an 8K context length in Stage I maintains comparable AIME24 accuracy under a 32K context length while significantly improving token efficiency (reducing the average response length from approximately 12.5K to 5.4K tokens). In Stages II and III, Skywork-OR1-Math-7B steadily increases response length while concurrently improving performance.
items.zh: 提高Token效率同时保持缩放潜力。截断响应在强化学习训练中被标记为负样本，因为它们缺少最终答案。多阶段训练的一个潜在问题是，使用短上下文窗口可能使模型偏向生成更短的响应，从而可能限制其探索能力并降低解决复杂问题的能力。我们的发现表明，多阶段训练不仅提高了初始阶段的Token效率，还保持了缩放能力。在图LABEL:fig:token_efficiency中，我们观察到，在阶段I使用8K上下文长度训练，在32K上下文长度下保持了相当的AIME24准确率，同时显著提高了Token效率（平均响应长度从约12.5K token减少到5.4K token）。在阶段II和III中，Skywork-OR1-Math-7B稳步增加响应长度，同时持续提升性能。

items.en: In practice, responses are sampled within a fixed context length TT. When response lengths exceed TT, the outcomes cannot be derived, and accuracy rewards are set to 0, resulting in negative advantages for these truncated responses, which may introduce bias. To mitigate this issue, we investigated several advantage mask strategies aimed at reducing the influence of truncated responses. However, our findings show that assigning negative advantages to truncated samples not only improves token efficiency but also preserves the model’s scaling ability in later stages. As a result, we did not apply any mask strategies in our final training pipeline.
items.zh: 在实践中，响应在固定上下文长度TT内采样。当响应长度超过TT时，无法得出结果，准确率奖励设为0，导致这些截断响应获得负优势，这可能引入偏差。为了缓解这个问题，我们研究了几种优势掩码策略，旨在减少截断响应的影响。然而，我们的发现表明，对截断样本分配负优势不仅提高了Token效率，还在后期阶段保持了模型的缩放能力。因此，我们在最终训练流程中没有应用任何掩码策略。

items.capEn: Figure 5: Training accuracy and clip ratio during RL training of Skywork-OR1-Math-7B in Stage I. accuracy: Mean accuracy reward on training batch. accuracy_nontruncated: Mean accuracy of non-truncated samples. clip_ratio: Ratio of truncated responses.
items.capZh: 图5：Skywork-OR1-Math-7B在阶段I强化学习训练期间的训练准确率和裁剪率。accuracy：训练批次上的平均准确率奖励。accuracy_nontruncated：非截断样本的平均准确率。clip_ratio：截断响应的比例。

items.en: Two Optimization Directions in Short Context Length. In our Stage I training of Skywork-OR1-Math-7B, we set the context length to T=8T=8K, and approximately 40% of responses were truncated at the initial steps. Although overall training accuracy continued to increase during RL training, we observed that the accuracy of non-truncated samples initially declined sharply within the first 100 training steps before showing a slight upward trend. See Figure 5 for details. A truncated response typically receives an accuracy reward of 0 because the final answer is missing due to truncation, even if it would be correct if fully generated. Therefore, reducing the number of truncated responses improves achievable accuracy. Figure 5 shows that the initial increase in training accuracy (steps 0-100) is primarily due to a sharp decrease in the clip ratio. After step 100, the algorithm begins to improve accuracy for non-truncated responses as well.
items.zh: 短上下文长度中的两个优化方向。在Skywork-OR1-Math-7B的阶段I训练中，我们将上下文长度设置为T=8T=8K，初始步骤中约40%的响应被截断。尽管在强化学习训练期间整体训练准确率持续上升，但我们观察到非截断样本的准确率在前100个训练步骤中最初急剧下降，然后才呈现轻微上升趋势。详情见图5。截断响应通常获得0的准确率奖励，因为由于截断缺少最终答案，即使完整生成时答案正确。因此，减少截断响应的数量可以提高可达到的准确率。图5显示，训练准确率的初始增加（步骤0-100）主要是由于裁剪率的急剧下降。在步骤100之后，算法也开始提高非截断响应的准确率。

Based on this observation, one can easily shows that the objective function 𝒥​(π)\mathcal{J}(\pi) satisfies
