items.en: where pnon−truncπ​(x):=ℙy∼π(⋅|x)​(|y|≤T)p^{\pi}_{\mathrm{non-trunc}}\left(x\right):=\mathbb{P}_{y\sim\pi\left(\cdot|x\right)}\left(\left|y\right|\leq T\right) is the probability that a response yy is not truncated by the limit of context length TT (we assume pnon−truncπ​(x)>0p^{\pi}_{\mathrm{non-trunc}}\left(x\right)>0 for simplicity), r¯non−truncπ​(x):=𝔼y∼π^T(⋅|x)​[r​(x,y)]\bar{r}_{\mathrm{non-trunc}}^{\pi}\left(x\right):=\mathbb{E}_{y\sim\hat{\pi}_{T}\left(\cdot|x\right)}\left[r\left(x,y\right)\right] is the accuracy of the non-truncated responses output by policy π\pi and π^T​(y|x):=π​(y|x)pnon−truncπ​(x)​𝕀​{|y|≤T}.\hat{\pi}_{T}\left(y|x\right):=\frac{\pi\left(y|x\right)}{p_{\mathrm{non}-\mathrm{trunc}}^{\pi}\left(x\right)}\mathbb{I}\left\{\left|y\right|\leq T\right\}. This implies that the accuracy on training distribution, i.e. 𝒥​(π)\mathcal{J}(\pi), can be increased by:
items.zh: 其中pnon−truncπ​(x):=ℙy∼π(⋅|x)​(|y|≤T)p^{\pi}_{\mathrm{non-trunc}}\left(x\right):=\mathbb{P}_{y\sim\pi\left(\cdot|x\right)}\left(\left|y\right|\leq T\right)是响应yy不被上下文长度TT截断的概率（为简单起见，我们假设pnon−truncπ​(x)>0p^{\pi}_{\mathrm{non-trunc}}\left(x\right)>0），r¯non−truncπ​(x):=𝔼y∼π^T(⋅|x)​[r​(x,y)]\bar{r}_{\mathrm{non-trunc}}^{\pi}\left(x\right):=\mathbb{E}_{y\sim\hat{\pi}_{T}\left(\cdot|x\right)}\left[r\left(x,y\right)\right]是策略π\pi输出的非截断响应的准确率，且π^T​(y|x):=π​(y|x)pnon−truncπ​(x)​𝕀​{|y|≤T}.\hat{\pi}_{T}\left(y|x\right):=\frac{\pi\left(y|x\right)}{p_{\mathrm{non}-\mathrm{trunc}}^{\pi}\left(x\right)}\mathbb{I}\left\{\left|y\right|\leq T\right\}.这意味着训练分布上的准确率，即𝒥​(π)\mathcal{J}(\pi)，可以通过以下方式提高：

items.en: increasing pnon−truncπ​(x)p_{\mathrm{non-trunc}}^{\pi}\left(x\right), which means the number of the responses that receive accuracy reward of 0 erroneously decreases.
items.zh: 增加pnon−truncπ​(x)p_{\mathrm{non-trunc}}^{\pi}\left(x\right)，这意味着错误地获得0准确率奖励的响应数量减少。

items.en: increasing rnon−truncπ​(x)r_{\mathrm{non-trunc}}^{\pi}\left(x\right), which means the response quality within the context length will be improved.
items.zh: 增加rnon−truncπ​(x)r_{\mathrm{non-trunc}}^{\pi}\left(x\right)，这意味着上下文长度内的响应质量将得到提高。

items.en: Advantage Mask for Truncated Responses. To encourage the algorithm to focus on optimizing accuracy within the context length – i.e., increasing rnon−truncπ​(x)r_{\mathrm{non-trunc}}^{\pi}\left(x\right) – rather than merely shortening responses to avoid erroneously receiving a zero accuracy reward – i.e., increasing pnon−truncπ​(x)p_{\mathrm{non-trunc}}^{\pi}\left(x\right) – we explored various advantage mask strategies. These strategies were designed to mitigate the impact of noisy training signals introduced by truncated samples. We conducted ablation experiments using DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B in Stage I to evaluate the effects of different advantage mask strategies.
items.zh: 截断响应的优势掩码。为了鼓励算法专注于优化上下文长度内的准确率——即增加rnon−truncπ​(x)r_{\mathrm{non-trunc}}^{\pi}\left(x\right)——而不是仅仅通过缩短响应来避免错误地获得零准确率奖励——即增加pnon−truncπ​(x)p_{\mathrm{non-trunc}}^{\pi}\left(x\right)——我们探索了各种优势掩码策略。这些策略旨在减轻截断样本引入的噪声训练信号的影响。我们使用DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B在阶段I进行了消融实验，以评估不同优势掩码策略的效果。

items.en: Advantage Mask Does Not Exhibit Better Performance Given a Larger Inference Budget. Although Ablation Experiments 2 demonstrate that r¯untruncπ​(x)\bar{r}_{\mathrm{untrunc}}^{\pi}\left(x\right) is optimized under short context lengths when applying advantage masks, we find that accuracy does not improve when the context length is large enough to avoid truncation (i.e., 32K). We compare the test-time scaling behavior on AIME24 for models trained with different advantage mask strategies (see Figure 8). The results show that applying an advantage mask does not improve test-time scaling behavior in Stage I, and accuracy at 32K remains unchanged-even though r¯non−truncπ​(x)\bar{r}_{\mathrm{non-trunc}}^{\pi}\left(x\right) is optimized during training. In contrast, RL training without an advantage mask in Stage I not only maintains accuracy at large context lengths but also significantly improves token efficiency. Moreover, the shorter response lengths learned in Stage I do not hinder the simultaneous improvements in both response length and accuracy observed in Stage II. Based on these findings, we did not apply any advantage mask to address noisy training signals from truncated samples in our final training recipe.
items.zh: 优势掩码在更大推理预算下并未表现出更好的性能。尽管消融实验2表明，在应用优势掩码时，短上下文长度下r¯untruncπ​(x)\bar{r}_{\mathrm{untrunc}}^{\pi}\left(x\right)得到了优化，但我们发现，当上下文长度足够大以避免截断（即32K）时，准确率并未提高。我们比较了不同优势掩码策略训练的模型在AIME24上的测试时缩放行为（见图8）。结果表明，在阶段I应用优势掩码并未改善测试时缩放行为，且32K下的准确率保持不变——尽管训练期间r¯non−truncπ​(x)\bar{r}_{\mathrm{non-trunc}}^{\pi}\left(x\right)得到了优化。相比之下，阶段I中不使用优势掩码的强化学习训练不仅保持了长上下文长度下的准确率，还显著提高了Token效率。此外，阶段I中学到的较短响应长度并未阻碍阶段II中响应长度和准确率的同步提升。基于这些发现，我们在最终训练方案中没有应用任何优势掩码来处理截断样本的噪声训练信号。

items.capEn: Figure 8: AIME24 avg@32 performance vs. context length for different advantage mask strategies in Ablation Experiments 3. All strategies achieve the same accuracy at the 32K context length. The accuracy was further improved after the training of Stage II even though the noisy training signals from truncated responses were introduced in Stage I.
items.capZh: 图8：消融实验3中不同优势掩码策略下AIME24 avg@32性能与上下文长度的关系。所有策略在32K上下文长度下达到相同的准确率。尽管阶段I引入了截断响应的噪声训练信号，但阶段II训练后准确率进一步提高。

items.capEn: Figure 9: AIME25 avg@8 performance and entropy versus the number of training steps in Ablation Experiments 3. Training with a temperature of 0.6 starts with the lowest entropy and learns more slowly than at a temperature of 1.0. Note that the entropy in the right plot remains around 0.2 because adaptive entropy control is enabled. This experiment was conducted on an earlier version of the 32B variant using only math data. Note also that in the left plot, the two temperatures indicate the rollout temperatures used during training. The scores of AIME25 were obtained by evaluating both models at a temperature of 0.6 to ensure a fair comparison.
items.capZh: 图9：消融实验3中AIME25 avg@8性能和熵随训练步数的变化。温度为0.6的训练初始熵最低，学习速度比温度为1.0时慢。注意，右图中的熵保持在0.2左右，因为启用了自适应熵控制。该实验是在早期版本的32B变体上仅使用数学数据进行的。另请注意，左图中的两个温度表示训练期间使用的rollout温度。AIME25的分数是通过在温度为0.6下评估两个模型获得的，以确保公平比较。

items.en: The group-wise nature of GRPO implies that the sampling procedure for responses directly affects the quality and diversity of each group, which in turn influences learning. Prior work suggests that higher temperatures generally lead to slightly worse performance due to increased randomness. If the temperature is set too high, it may increase the likelihood of sampling groups containing only incorrect responses, thereby reducing training efficiency due to the absence of advantageous signals. On the other hand, using a low temperature reduces group diversity, resulting in solutions that are highly similar or potentially all correct. Therefore, selecting an appropriate temperature is critical to ensure sufficient in-group solution diversity. We conducted ablation experiments on the choice of sampling temperature τ\tau, and the results are presented in Figure 9.
items.zh: GRPO的分组性质意味着响应的采样过程直接影响每组的质量和多样性，进而影响学习。先前的工作表明，较高的温度通常由于随机性增加而导致性能略差。如果温度设置过高，可能会增加采样到仅包含错误响应的组的可能性，从而因缺乏优势信号而降低训练效率。另一方面，使用低温会降低组多样性，导致解决方案高度相似或可能全部正确。因此，选择合适的温度对于确保组内解决方案的充分多样性至关重要。我们对采样温度τ\tau的选择进行了消融实验，结果如图9所示。

items.en: In our experiments, we identified an additional entropy-related phenomenon: when a low temperature is used (e.g., 0.6), the model either begins with extremely low entropy or its entropy quickly collapses to near zero within approximately 100 steps. This behavior initially slows learning progress and ultimately leads to stagnation. We hypothesize that with a less diverse group of solutions – despite containing both correct and incorrect responses – the policy update becomes overly focused on a narrow subset of tokens. This results in a large probability mass being assigned to specific tokens that frequently appear in the sampled responses. When we increased the rollout temperature to 1.0, the model’s initial entropy rose to a more desirable range. Although entropy still eventually converges, the higher temperature substantially enhances the learning signal in the early stages and preserves greater potential for continued training, as shown in the figure above.
items.zh: 在我们的实验中，我们发现了另一个与熵相关的现象：当使用低温（例如0.6）时，模型要么初始熵极低，要么其熵在大约100步内迅速崩溃到接近零。这种行为最初会减慢学习进度，并最终导致停滞。我们假设，当组内解决方案多样性不足时——尽管同时包含正确和错误响应——策略更新会过度关注一个狭窄的token子集。这导致大量概率质量分配给采样响应中频繁出现的特定token。当我们将rollout温度提高到1.0时，模型的初始熵上升到更理想的范围。尽管熵最终仍然收敛，但较高的温度显著增强了早期阶段的学习信号，并为继续训练保留了更大的潜力，如上图所示。

items.en: Building on the findings from Section 4 – which suggest that while preventing premature entropy collapse via entropy regularization is beneficial, selecting an appropriate entropy loss coefficient is challenging – we introduce Adaptive Entropy Control, a method that adaptively adjusts the entropy loss coefficient based on the target and current entropy. Specifically, we introduce two additional hyperparameters: tgt-ent (the desired target entropy) and Δ\Delta (the adjustment step size for the entropy loss coefficient). We initialize the adaptive coefficient with c0=0c_{0}=0. At each training step kk, let ee denote the current entropy of the actor (estimated from the rollout buffer). If ee is less than tgt-ent, we increase ckc_{k} by Δ\Delta (i.e., ck+1=ck+Δc_{k+1}=c_{k}+\Delta). If ee exceeds tgt-ent, we decrease ckc_{k} by Δ\Delta. To alleviate instability caused by unnecessary entropy loss, we activate the entropy loss only when e≤e\leq tgt-ent, i.e., αk=ck⋅𝕀​{e≤tgt-ent}\alpha_{k}=c_{k}\cdot\mathbb{I}\{e\leq\text{{tgt-ent}}\}, ensuring that the current entropy remains lower-bounded by the target entropy.
items.zh: 基于第4节的发现——该节表明，虽然通过熵正则化防止过早熵崩溃是有益的，但选择合适的熵损失系数具有挑战性——我们引入了自适应熵控制，一种根据目标熵和当前熵自适应调整熵损失系数的方法。具体来说，我们引入了两个额外的超参数：tgt-ent（期望的目标熵）和Δ\Delta（熵损失系数的调整步长）。我们将自适应系数初始化为c0=0c_{0}=0。在每个训练步骤kk，令ee表示当前演员的熵（从rollout缓冲区估计）。如果ee小于tgt-ent，我们将ckc_k增加Δ\Delta（即ck+1=ck+Δc_{k+1}=c_k+\Delta）。如果ee超过tgt-ent，我们将ckc_k减少Δ\Delta。为了缓解不必要的熵损失带来的不稳定性，我们仅在e≤e\leq tgt-ent时激活熵损失，即αk=ck⋅𝕀​{e≤tgt-ent}\alpha_k=c_k\cdot\mathbb{I}\{e\leq\text{{tgt-ent}}\}，确保当前熵由目标熵下界约束。

items.en: By leveraging adaptive entropy control, we maintain the model’s entropy at a reasonable level throughout training and effectively prevent premature collapse. Figure 10 illustrates the entropy trajectory of Skywork-OR1-Math-7B across all training stages. In our experiments, we set tgt-ent = 0.2 and Δ\Delta = 0.005. To further validate the effectiveness of adaptive entropy control, we conducted an ablation study detailed in Section 4.5.
items.zh: 通过利用自适应熵控制，我们将模型的熵在整个训练过程中保持在合理水平，并有效防止过早崩溃。图10展示了Skywork-OR1-Math-7B在所有训练阶段的熵轨迹。在我们的实验中，我们设置tgt-ent = 0.2和Δ\Delta = 0.005。为了进一步验证自适应熵控制的有效性，我们进行了消融研究，详见第4.5节。

items.capEn: Figure 10: Entropy of generated responses (left) and avg@8 performance on AIME24 (right) of Skywork-OR1-Math-7B across all stages. We use adaptive entropy control with tgt-ent=0.2 and Δ=0.005\Delta=0.005 . Under adaptive entropy control, the entropy of Skywork-OR1-Math-7B is generally lower-bounded by the target entropy 0.2 and the performance on AIME24 has been steadily improving.
items.capZh: 图10：Skywork-OR1-Math-7B在所有阶段生成的响应的熵（左）和AIME24上的avg@8性能（右）。我们使用自适应熵控制，tgt-ent=0.2且Δ=0.005\Delta=0.005。在自适应熵控制下，Skywork-OR1-Math-7B的熵通常由目标熵0.2下界约束，且AIME24上的性能稳步提升。

items.en: To investigate the impact of the KL loss, we conducted the following ablation experiments.
items.zh: 为了研究KL损失的影响，我们进行了以下消融实验。

items.en: We observe that, in Stage 2, the KL loss strongly pulls the actor model’s policy back toward the reference model, causing the KL divergence to rapidly decrease toward zero (see Figure LABEL:fig:kl_loss_comparison). As a result, performance on AIME24 fails to improve significantly once the actor’s policy becomes too similar to the reference policy (see Figure LABEL:fig:kl_loss_aime24_comparison). Based on this observation, we set β=0\beta=0 for all training stages of our released models.
items.zh: 我们观察到，在第二阶段，KL损失强烈地将演员模型的策略拉向参考模型，导致KL散度迅速降至接近零（见图LABEL:fig:kl_loss_comparison）。结果，一旦演员的策略变得与参考策略过于相似，AIME24上的性能就无法显著提升（见图LABEL:fig:kl_loss_aime24_comparison）。基于这一观察，我们在发布模型的所有训练阶段设置β=0。

full.sec: 4 Empirical Studies on Mitigating Policy Entropy Collapse
full.secZh: 4 缓解策略熵崩溃的实证研究

items.capEn: Figure 12: Overview of our empirical studies on mitigating policy entropy collapse. Gray‌ and green blocks: The potential benefits and possible approaches to enhance the model’s exploration capability and mitigate entropy collapse. Yellow blocks: The experimental variables in our empirical studies on keeping the model’s exploration capability and maintaining high plasticity.
items.capZh: 图12：我们关于缓解策略熵坍塌的实证研究概览。灰色和绿色块：增强模型探索能力和缓解熵坍塌的潜在益处和可能方法。黄色块：我们在保持模型探索能力和维持高可塑性方面的实证研究中的实验变量。

items.en: Exploration and exploitation represent one of the most fundamental dilemmas in RL training [22], particularly in on-policy algorithms. In brief, achieving better performance requires sufficient exploration. However, if the agent’s policy prematurely converges to a specific solution, that policy may be suboptimal, and such convergence hinders the exploration of diverse trajectories. An important metric for monitoring the convergence of RL algorithms is policy entropy. In general, when a model’s policy entropy converges to a very small value (e.g., near zero), the policy stabilizes. At this point, the model’s generation behavior becomes resistant to updates from training data, leading to reduced learning efficiency and diminished output diversity. To expose the model to more effective training signals and improve its out-of-distribution (OOD) performance, it is therefore critical to prevent premature entropy collapse in practice. This section investigates which hyperparameters and components of the policy update process help prevent entropy collapse and, in turn, improve OOD generalization. The overall framework of our empirical study on alleviating policy entropy collapse is illustrated in Figure 12. Initially, we hypothesize that the following two sources may influence the model’s entropy and convergence behavior:
items.zh: 探索与利用是强化学习训练中最基本的困境之一[22]，尤其是在同策略算法中。简而言之，要实现更好的性能需要充分的探索。然而，如果智能体的策略过早收敛到某个特定解，该策略可能是次优的，并且这种收敛阻碍了对多样化轨迹的探索。监控强化学习算法收敛的一个重要指标是策略熵。通常，当模型的策略熵收敛到一个非常小的值（例如接近零）时，策略趋于稳定。此时，模型的生成行为变得抗拒训练数据的更新，导致学习效率降低和输出多样性减少。为了让模型接触到更有效的训练信号并提高其分布外（OOD）性能，在实践中防止过早的熵坍塌至关重要。本节研究策略更新过程中的哪些超参数和组件有助于防止熵坍塌，并进而改善OOD泛化。我们关于缓解策略熵坍塌的实证研究的整体框架如图12所示。最初，我们假设以下两个来源可能影响模型的熵和收敛行为：

items.en: Rollout diversity. If the rollout data contain a greater diversity of correct responses, this prevents the model from overfitting to a single correct trajectory. We examine how sampling-related hyperparameters – such as sampling temperature, rollout batch size, and group size – affect the model’s policy entropy during RL training.
items.zh: 展开多样性。如果展开数据包含更多样化的正确响应，这将防止模型过拟合到单一的正确轨迹。我们研究了采样相关超参数——如采样温度、展开批次大小和组大小——如何在强化学习训练期间影响模型的策略熵。

items.en: Policy update. We also investigate how different components of the policy update influence entropy. In this section, we focus primarily on the number of stochastic gradient descent (SGD) steps per training step and the use of additional entropy control methods (e.g., entropy loss).
items.zh: 策略更新。我们还研究了策略更新的不同组件如何影响熵。在本节中，我们主要关注每个训练步的随机梯度下降（SGD）步数以及额外熵控制方法（例如熵损失）的使用。

items.en: After conducting exhaustive ablation experiments, we present our main results below.
items.zh: 在进行了详尽的消融实验后，我们在下面展示主要结果。

items.en: All ablation experiments presented in Section 4 are conducted using the training pipeline described in Section 3.1. We start from the following baseline experiment based on DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B with its hyperparameters reported in Table 5, the key symbols used are defined as follows:
items.zh: 第4节中呈现的所有消融实验均使用第3.1节中描述的训练流程进行。我们从基于DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B的以下基线实验开始，其超参数见表5，使用的关键符号定义如下：

items.en: DRD_{R} is the rollout batch size (the number of prompts used to generate responses in one training step).
items.zh: DR是展开批次大小（一个训练步中用于生成响应的提示数量）。

items.en: DTD_{T} is the mini-batch size (the number of prompts corresponding to the responses used per policy update step).
items.zh: DT是小批量大小（每个策略更新步对应的响应所对应的提示数量）。

items.en: NreuseN_{\text{reuse}} is the number of times the rollout buffer is traversed.
items.zh: Nreuse是展开缓冲区被遍历的次数。

items.en: g​sgs is the group size (the number of responses generated for each prompt).
items.zh: gs是组大小（每个提示生成的响应数量）。

items.en: Unless otherwise specified, the default training configurations for all ablation experiments in this section are aligned with those of the baseline experiment presented above. We use AIME24, AIME25, and LiveCodeBench [10] (2024.08–2025.02) as evaluation sets. The test performance reported in our ablation study is computed as the empirical mean of avg@8 performance on AIME24/25 and pass@1 performance on LiveCodeBench. Notably, the baseline experiment achieves 69.2% avg@8 on AIME24, 53.3% avg@8 on AIME25, and 50.5% pass@1 on LiveCodeBench after 2,700 training steps using 32 H800 GPUs. These results, which closely approximate the performance of our final Skywork-OR1-7B release, establish a strong baseline for analyzing key factors that affect test performance and contribute to entropy collapse.
items.zh: 除非另有说明，本节中所有消融实验的默认训练配置与上述基线实验一致。我们使用AIME24、AIME25和LiveCodeBench [10]（2024.08–2025.02）作为评估集。我们的消融研究中报告的测试性能计算为AIME24/25上avg@8性能和LiveCodeBench上pass@1性能的经验均值。值得注意的是，基线实验在使用32块H800 GPU训练2,700步后，在AIME24上达到69.2%的avg@8，在AIME25上达到53.3%的avg@8，在LiveCodeBench上达到50.5%的pass@1。这些结果非常接近我们最终发布的Skywork-OR1-7B的性能，为分析影响测试性能和导致熵坍塌的关键因素建立了强大的基线。

full.sec: 4.2 Premature Entropy Collapse Generally Manifests as Worse Performance
full.secZh: 4.2 过早熵崩溃通常表现为性能下降

items.en: As previously noted, entropy dynamics during RL training reflect the degree of policy convergence. When the actor converges to a specific policy and enters a low-entropy state, both learning efficiency and rollout diversity tend to decline. In our preliminary experiments, we observed that the entropy of the actor model often decreased rapidly during training. To mitigate premature entropy collapse, we introduced an entropy loss term, hypothesizing that it would allow the actor to converge toward a better policy. Our results confirmed this hypothesis: test performance improved with the addition of entropy loss. Figure 13 presents the accuracy curves on test benchmarks and the entropy of generated responses from two preliminary experiments using different values of the entropy loss coefficient αk\alpha_{k} (1e-3 vs. 5e-3). The results show that using a higher coefficient (i.e., 5e-3) more effectively prevents entropy collapse and leads to better generalization performance. Furthermore, our ablation experiments in Section 4.4 reinforce this finding, showing that RL training accompanied by premature entropy collapse generally results in worse test performance. These observations motivate our integration of entropy control mechanisms into the training pipeline, as well as our systematic investigation into how hyperparameters and other RL components influence entropy dynamics.
items.zh: 如前所述，强化学习训练期间的熵动态反映了策略收敛的程度。当演员收敛到特定策略并进入低熵状态时，学习效率和展开多样性往往会下降。在我们的初步实验中，我们观察到演员模型的熵在训练期间经常迅速下降。为了缓解过早的熵坍塌，我们引入了一个熵损失项，假设它能让演员收敛到更好的策略。我们的结果证实了这一假设：添加熵损失后测试性能有所提升。图13展示了使用不同熵损失系数αk（1e-3 vs. 5e-3）的两个初步实验中测试基准的准确率曲线和生成响应的熵。结果表明，使用更高的系数（即5e-3）能更有效地防止熵坍塌，并带来更好的泛化性能。此外，我们在第4.4节中的消融实验强化了这一发现，表明伴随过早熵坍塌的强化学习训练通常会导致更差的测试性能。这些观察促使我们将熵控制机制整合到训练流程中，并系统研究超参数和其他强化学习组件如何影响熵动态。

items.capEn: Figure 13: Preliminary experiments on mitigating entropy collapse by introducing entropy loss. We tested two different coefficients αk=\alpha_{k}= 1e-3 and 5e-3, and found that the entropy loss with the higher coefficient αk\alpha_{k}, i.e., 5e-3, more effectively prevents entropy collapse and achieves higher test performance. Left: Accuracy curves on test benchmarks during RL training. Right: Entropy of generated responses during RL training.
items.capZh: 图13：通过引入熵损失缓解熵坍塌的初步实验。我们测试了两个不同的系数αk=1e-3和5e-3，发现具有更高系数αk（即5e-3）的熵损失能更有效地防止熵坍塌并实现更高的测试性能。左图：强化学习训练期间测试基准的准确率曲线。右图：强化学习训练期间生成响应的熵。

full.secZh: 4.3 展开多样性相关超参数的影响

items.en: We investigated how the rollout batch size DRD_{R}, group size g​sgs, and sampling temperature τ\tau influence entropy dynamics. Note that increasing the rollout batch size DRD_{R} and group size g​sgs during the rollout stage results in a larger rollout budget, which typically requires greater computational resources to accelerate training. Therefore, we provide a detailed discussion of the impact of DRD_{R} and g​sgs in Section 5, which focuses on training-time computational resource allocation for improved test performance. Here, we present only the experimental results related to policy entropy. Specifically, we conducted ablation experiments using rollout batch sizes DR=16,32,64D_{R}=16,32,64 and group sizes g​s=4,8,16gs=4,8,16, based on the baseline experiment described in Section 4.1 and analyzed in Section 5. Our results (Figure 14) indicate no significant differences in entropy dynamics across these on-policy configurations. Notably, none of these experiments exhibited entropy collapse. Regarding the sampling temperature τ\tau, we found that using a properly chosen but relatively high temperature led to lower test accuracy during the initial training steps, but ultimately resulted in greater performance improvements. For further details, please refer to Section 3.2.4.
items.zh: 我们研究了展开批次大小DR、组大小gs和采样温度τ如何影响熵动态。注意，在展开阶段增加展开批次大小DR和组大小gs会导致更大的展开预算，这通常需要更多的计算资源来加速训练。因此，我们在第5节中详细讨论了DR和gs的影响，该节侧重于训练时计算资源分配以改善测试性能。这里我们仅展示与策略熵相关的实验结果。具体来说，我们基于第4.1节描述并在第5节中分析的基线实验，使用展开批次大小DR=16,32,64和组大小gs=4,8,16进行了消融实验。我们的结果（图14）表明，在这些同策略配置下，熵动态没有显著差异。值得注意的是，这些实验均未出现熵坍塌。关于采样温度τ，我们发现使用适当选择但相对较高的温度会导致初始训练步中测试准确率较低，但最终带来更大的性能提升。更多细节请参考第3.2.4节。

items.capEn: Figure 14: Entropy of generated responses during on-policy updates with different rollout batch sizes DRD_{R} (left) and group size gs (right). All the experiments exhibit similar entropy dynamics.
items.capZh: 图14：不同展开批次大小DR（左）和组大小gs（右）下同策略更新期间生成响应的熵。所有实验均表现出相似的熵动态。

full.sec: 4.4 The Impact of Off-policy Update by Increasing NSGDN_{\text{SGD}}
full.secZh: 4.4 通过增加NSGDN_{\text{SGD}}进行离策略更新的影响

items.capEn: Figure 15: Illustration of on-policy vs. off-policy update in PPO-style policy loss. On-policy update applies a single SGD step to the entire rollout batch, whereas off-policy update implements multiple SGD steps through rollout batch decomposition and reuse. The rollout batch is partitioned into DRDT\frac{D_{R}}{D_{T}} mini-batches, with each mini-batch undergoing an independent SGD step. Then, one can iterate over the rollout batch NreuseN_{\text{reuse}} times. Thus, the total number of SGD steps performed on one rollout batch is DRDT×Nreuse\frac{D_{R}}{D_{T}}\times N_{\text{reuse}}.
items.capZh: 图15：PPO风格策略损失中同策略与异策略更新的示意图。同策略更新对整个展开批次应用单个SGD步，而异策略更新通过展开批次分解和重用实现多个SGD步。展开批次被划分为DR/DT个小批量，每个小批量独立进行一个SGD步。然后，可以对展开批次迭代Nreuse次。因此，在一个展开批次上执行的SGD步总数为DR/DT × Nreuse。

items.en: Note that the policy loss (3.1) in MAGIC is PPO-style, which naturally allows for performing multiple SGD steps through rollout batch decomposition and reuse (as illustrated in Figure 15). Recalling the definitions of DRD_{R},DTD_{T} and NreuseN_{\text{reuse}} from Section 4.1, it is clear that the number of SGD steps performed in one training step, i.e. NSGDN_{\text{SGD}}, satisfies
items.zh: 注意，MAGIC中的策略损失（3.1）是PPO风格的，它自然允许通过展开批次分解和重用执行多个SGD步（如图15所示）。回顾第4.1节中DR、DT和Nreuse的定义，显然每个训练步中执行的SGD步数NSGD满足：当DR=DT且Nreuse=1时，策略更新纯粹是同策略的，因为NSGD=1。相反，当DT<DR或Nreuse≥2时，NSGD≥2，异策略数据被引入策略更新。在本节中，我们研究NSGD如何影响熵动态和测试性能提升。

items.en: When DR=DTD_{R}=D_{T} and Nreuse=1N_{\text{reuse}}=1, the policy update is purely on-policy since NSGD=1N_{\text{SGD}}=1. In contrast, when DT<DRD_{T}<D_{R} or Nreuse≥2N_{\text{reuse}}\geq 2, NSGD≥2N_{\text{SGD}}\geq 2 and the off-policy data is introduced into the policy update. In this section, we investigate how NSGDN_{\text{SGD}} affects the entropy dynamics and the test performance improvement.
We conducted the following ablation experiments on different NSGDN_{\text{SGD}} values by decreasing DTD_{T} or increasing NreuseN_{\text{reuse}} given fixed DRD_{R}.
items.zh: 我们通过固定 DRD_R，减小 DTD_T 或增加 NreuseN_{\text{reuse}}，对不同的 NSGDN_{\text{SGD}} 值进行了以下消融实验。

items.capEn: Figure 16: Results of Ablation Experiments 6. Off-policy training with increased NSGDN_{\text{SGD}} by either decreasing DTD_{T} or increasing NreuseN_{\text{reuse}} accelerates entropy collapse and exhibits worse test performance. Left: Entropy of generated responses during RL training. Right: Test performance during RL training.
items.capZh: 图 16：消融实验 6 的结果。通过减小 DTD_T 或增加 NreuseN_{\text{reuse}} 来增加 NSGDN_{\text{SGD}} 的离策略训练加速了熵崩溃，并表现出更差的测试性能。左图：RL 训练期间生成响应的熵。右图：RL 训练期间的测试性能。

items.en: As shown in Figure 16, experiments with NSGD∈{2,4}N_{\text{SGD}}\in\{2,4\} exhibit faster policy convergence, with entropy decaying to very small values within a few training steps. As a result, test performance fails to improve consistently once the model enters a low-entropy state. In contrast, using an on-policy update with the configuration (1,64,64,1)(1,64,64,1) significantly alleviates this issue, leading to a gradual decline in entropy and a steady, albeit slower, improvement in test performance. Ultimately, the on-policy update with configuration (1,64,64,1)(1,64,64,1) achieves superior test performance when the number of training steps is sufficiently large.
items.zh: 如图 16 所示，NSGD∈{2,4}N_{\text{SGD}}\in\{2,4\} 的实验表现出更快的策略收敛，熵在几个训练步骤内衰减到非常小的值。因此，一旦模型进入低熵状态，测试性能无法持续改善。相比之下，使用配置 (1,64,64,1)(1,64,64,1) 的在策略更新显著缓解了这一问题，导致熵逐渐下降，测试性能稳步（尽管较慢）提升。最终，当训练步数足够大时，配置 (1,64,64,1)(1,64,64,1) 的在策略更新实现了更优的测试性能。

items.en: We now investigate which factor in off-policy updates is more likely to contribute to degraded test performance. We identify the following two potential contributors that may influence the gradient direction in each SGD step: (1) the mini-batch size DTD_{T}, and (2) the use of off-policy data. In the data reuse experiments with Nreuse∈{2,4}N_{\text{reuse}}\in\{2,4\}, since DTD_{T} is held constant and matches the value used in the on-policy setting, we attribute the degraded test performance to the use of off-policy data introduced through rollout batch reuse. In experiments that involve more mini-batches (i.e., DT∈{16,32}D_{T}\in\{16,32\}), the performance drop compared to the on-policy update may be due to both the smaller mini-batch size – leading to greater gradient variance – and the presence of off-policy data. To better understand which factor contributes more significantly, we conducted the following ablation experiments.
items.zh: 我们现在研究离策略更新中哪个因素更可能导致测试性能下降。我们确定了以下两个可能影响每个 SGD 步骤梯度方向的潜在因素：(1) 小批量大小 DTD_T，以及 (2) 离策略数据的使用。在 Nreuse∈{2,4}N_{\text{reuse}}\in\{2,4\} 的数据重用实验中，由于 DTD_T 保持不变且与在策略设置中的值匹配，我们将测试性能下降归因于通过 rollout 批量重用引入的离策略数据。在涉及更多小批量的实验（即 DT∈{16,32}D_{T}\in\{16,32\}）中，与在策略更新相比的性能下降可能归因于更小的小批量大小（导致更大的梯度方差）和离策略数据的存在。为了更好地理解哪个因素贡献更大，我们进行了以下消融实验。

items.capEn: Figure 17: Results of Ablation Experiments 7. On-policy experiments, i.e. NSGD=1N_{\text{SGD}}=1, do not exhibit premature entropy collapse and finally outperform the off-policy counterparts with the same DTD_{T} when training step is sufficiently large. Left: Entropy of generated responses during RL training. Right: Test performance at temperature 1 during RL training.
items.capZh: 图 17：消融实验 7 的结果。在策略实验，即 NSGD=1N_{\text{SGD}}=1，不会出现过早的熵崩溃，并且当训练步数足够大时，最终优于具有相同 DTD_T 的离策略对应实验。左图：RL 训练期间生成响应的熵。右图：RL 训练期间温度 1 下的测试性能。

items.en: The experimental results shown in Figure 17 indicate that the on-policy update with a smaller DTD_{T} – relative to the baseline experiment – still yields steady improvements in test performance, and premature entropy collapse does not occur. Ultimately, the on-policy update outperforms the off-policy update with the same DTD_{T} when the number of training steps is sufficiently large. Based on these observations, we hypothesize that the degraded test performance in the off-policy update is primarily caused by the introduction of off-policy data in each SGD step.
items.zh: 图 17 所示的实验结果表明，与基线实验相比，具有较小 DTD_T 的在策略更新仍然产生稳定的测试性能提升，并且不会发生过早的熵崩溃。最终，当训练步数足够大时，在策略更新优于具有相同 DTD_T 的离策略更新。基于这些观察，我们假设离策略更新中测试性能下降主要是由每个 SGD 步骤中引入离策略数据引起的。

items.en: Can a Large DRD_{R} in Off-Policy Updates Prevent Premature Entropy Collapse? Consider the off-policy experiment in Ablation Experiments 6 with the quadruple (NSGD,DR,DT,Nreuse)=(4,64,16,1)(N_{\text{SGD}},D_{R},D_{T},N_{\text{reuse}})=(4,64,16,1). We attempted to increase the rollout batch size DRD_{R} from 64 to 256 while keeping NSGD=4N_{\text{SGD}}=4 fixed (i.e., resulting in the configuration (NSGD,DR,DT,Nreuse)=(4,256,64,1)(N_{\text{SGD}},D_{R},D_{T},N_{\text{reuse}})=(4,256,64,1)), with the expectation that this would introduce more diverse samples and prevent convergence on single trajectory. However, our results in Figure 18 indicates that even with a larger DRD_{R}, premature entropy collapse not only still occurs but may even do so more rapidly.
items.zh: 离策略更新中的大 DRD_R 能否防止过早的熵崩溃？考虑消融实验 6 中四元组 (NSGD,DR,DT,Nreuse)=(4,64,16,1)(N_{\text{SGD}},D_{R},D_{T},N_{\text{reuse}})=(4,64,16,1) 的离策略实验。我们尝试将 rollout 批量大小 DRD_R 从 64 增加到 256，同时保持 NSGD=4N_{\text{SGD}}=4 固定（即产生配置 (NSGD,DR,DT,Nreuse)=(4,256,64,1)(N_{\text{SGD}},D_{R},D_{T},N_{\text{reuse}})=(4,256,64,1)），期望这将引入更多样化的样本并防止收敛到单一轨迹。然而，我们在图 18 中的结果表明，即使使用更大的 DRD_R，过早的熵崩溃不仅仍然发生，而且可能发生得更快。

items.capEn: Figure 18: Keeping DRDT=4\frac{D_{R}}{D_{T}}=4 and Nreuse=1N_{\text{reuse}}=1, off-policy training with a larger DRD_{R}, i.e., DR=256D_{R}=256, does not prevent the premature entropy collapse. Both off-policy experiments, i.e. NSGD=4N_{\text{SGD}}=4, exhibit faster entropy convergence compared with the on-policy experiment with NSGD=1N_{\text{SGD}}=1.
items.capZh: 图 18：保持 DRDT=4\frac{D_{R}}{D_{T}}=4 和 Nreuse=1N_{\text{reuse}}=1，使用更大 DRD_R（即 DR=256D_{R}=256）的离策略训练并不能防止过早的熵崩溃。两个离策略实验（即 NSGD=4N_{\text{SGD}}=4）与 NSGD=1N_{\text{SGD}}=1 的在策略实验相比，都表现出更快的熵收敛。

items.en: As previously discussed, premature entropy collapse is often associated with degraded test performance. It is therefore reasonable to expect that proper entropy control can lead to improved outcomes. As shown earlier, increasing NSGDN_{\text{SGD}} and introducing off-policy data accelerate entropy convergence. However, there are an increasing number of scenarios where the use of off-policy data is unavoidable – for example, in asynchronous training frameworks. Thus, it is also important to study entropy control mechanisms under off-policy settings. We begin by examining entropy regularization, a straightforward approach that attempts to prevent entropy collapse by directly adding an entropy loss term. Our preliminary experiments, presented in Section 4.2, show that applying entropy regularization with an appropriately chosen coefficient can mitigate entropy collapse and improve test performance. However, we later observed that the effectiveness of entropy regularization is highly sensitive to both the choice of coefficient and the characteristics of the training data, making it difficult to select an optimal coefficient in advance. This motivates a dynamic adjustment of the entropy loss coefficient. In addition, we consider the clip-higher trick proposed in [34] as another means of entropy control. In the following, we present our detailed findings.
items.zh: 如前所述，过早的熵崩溃通常与测试性能下降相关。因此，合理的预期是适当的熵控制可以带来更好的结果。如前所示，增加 NSGDN_{\text{SGD}} 和引入离策略数据加速了熵收敛。然而，越来越多的场景中离策略数据的使用是不可避免的——例如，在异步训练框架中。因此，研究离策略设置下的熵控制机制也很重要。我们首先研究熵正则化，这是一种通过直接添加熵损失项来防止熵崩溃的简单方法。我们在第 4.2 节中的初步实验表明，使用适当选择的系数应用熵正则化可以缓解熵崩溃并提高测试性能。然而，我们后来观察到熵正则化的有效性对系数的选择和训练数据的特征高度敏感，这使得难以预先选择最优系数。这促使我们动态调整熵损失系数。此外，我们考虑 [34] 中提出的 clip-higher 技巧作为另一种熵控制手段。下面，我们介绍我们的详细发现。

items.en: To demonstrate the sensitivity of entropy loss to the choice of αk\alpha_{k}, we conduct the following ablation study.
items.zh: 为了展示熵损失对 αk\alpha_k 选择的敏感性，我们进行了以下消融研究。

items.capEn: Figure 19: The results of Ablation Experiments 8. Left: The entropy of generated responses during RL training. Right: The AIME24 avg@8 performance at temperature 1 during RL training.
items.capZh: 图 19：消融实验 8 的结果。左图：RL 训练期间生成响应的熵。右图：RL 训练期间温度 1 下的 AIME24 avg@8 性能。

items.en: From the results in Figure 19, we find that:
items.zh: 从图 19 的结果中，我们发现：

items.en: For αk\alpha_{k} = 5e-4, 1e-3, 5e-3, and 1e-2, the entropy eventually rises sharply, leading to model collapse. The larger the αk\alpha_{k}, the more rapidly the entropy increases.
items.zh: 对于 αk\alpha_k = 5e-4、1e-3、5e-3 和 1e-2，熵最终急剧上升，导致模型崩溃。αk\alpha_k 越大，熵增加得越快。

items.en: For αk\alpha_{k} = 1e-4, while entropy does not exhibit a continuous rise, it still collapses, persistently decreasing toward zero.
items.zh: 对于 αk\alpha_k = 1e-4，虽然熵没有持续上升，但仍然崩溃，持续下降到接近零。

items.en: From our two preliminary experiments, we observe that the entropy loss is highly sensitive to variations in training data. We conducted two experiments under identical configurations, both using an entropy loss coefficient of 1e-3. The only difference between the two setups was the training dataset used (both datasets belong to the math domain). The results, shown in Figure 20, reveal a striking difference in entropy dynamics: while the original dataset exhibited a steady decline in entropy throughout training, the new dataset resulted in a consistent upward trend in entropy. This finding highlights the data-dependent nature of tuning the entropy loss coefficient.
items.zh: 从我们的两个初步实验中，我们观察到熵损失对训练数据的变化高度敏感。我们在相同配置下进行了两个实验，都使用熵损失系数 1e-3。两个设置之间的唯一区别是使用的训练数据集（两个数据集都属于数学领域）。结果如图 20 所示，揭示了熵动态的显著差异：原始数据集在整个训练过程中熵稳步下降，而新数据集导致熵持续上升。这一发现凸显了调整熵损失系数的数据依赖性。

items.capEn: Figure 20: Preliminary experiments investigating how training data affects the entropy during RL training. Both experiments used the same hyperparameter configurations with αk\alpha_{k}=1e-3 but differed in the training data. Both datasets are in math domain. simply switching the dataset resulted in dramatically different entropy evolution patterns
items.capZh: 图 20：研究训练数据如何影响 RL 训练期间熵的初步实验。两个实验使用相同的超参数配置，αk\alpha_k=1e-3，但训练数据不同。两个数据集都属于数学领域。仅仅切换数据集就导致了截然不同的熵演化模式。

items.en: Based on our findings regarding the sensitivity of entropy loss, we propose a method called adaptive entropy control (see Section 3.2.5 for details), which dynamically adjusts the entropy loss coefficient during training. As shown in Figure 10, the entropy of Skywork-OR1-Math-7B remains lower-bounded by the target entropy throughout the RL training process. To further validate the effectiveness of adaptive entropy control, we conduct the following ablation experiments.
items.zh: 基于我们对熵损失敏感性的发现，我们提出了一种称为自适应熵控制的方法（详见第 3.2.5 节），该方法在训练过程中动态调整熵损失系数。如图 10 所示，Skywork-OR1-Math-7B 的熵在整个 RL 训练过程中始终以目标熵为下界。为了进一步验证自适应熵控制的有效性，我们进行了以下消融实验。

items.en: As previously analyzed, increasing NSGDN_{\text{SGD}} accelerates policy convergence and leads to degraded test performance. As shown in Figure 21, applying adaptive entropy control successfully prevents entropy collapse and results in higher test performance. However, it is worth noting that, although the coefficient is adjusted adaptively, entropy remains unstable when NSGDN_{\text{SGD}} is large. We speculate that this is due to the entropy loss being computed over the entire vocabulary, which may increase the probability of many unintended tokens. Therefore, we do not recommend using adaptive entropy control in scenarios where NSGDN_{\text{SGD}} is large. Nonetheless, we find that when NSGD=1N_{\text{SGD}}=1 or 22, entropy dynamics remain acceptably stable under adaptive entropy control. Based on these findings, we adopt adaptive entropy control in the training of our Skywork-OR1 models.
items.zh: 如前所述，增加 NSGDN_{\text{SGD}} 会加速策略收敛并导致测试性能下降。如图 21 所示，应用自适应熵控制成功防止了熵崩溃，并带来了更高的测试性能。然而，值得注意的是，尽管系数是自适应调整的，但当 NSGDN_{\text{SGD}} 较大时，熵仍然不稳定。我们推测这是因为熵损失是在整个词汇表上计算的，这可能会增加许多非预期 token 的概率。因此，我们不建议在 NSGDN_{\text{SGD}} 较大的场景中使用自适应熵控制。尽管如此，我们发现当 NSGD=1N_{\text{SGD}}=1 或 22 时，在自适应熵控制下熵动态保持可接受的稳定。基于这些发现，我们在 Skywork-OR1 模型的训练中采用了自适应熵控制。

items.capEn: Figure 21: The results of Ablation Experiments 9. Applying adaptive entropy control prevents the entropy collapse, leading to a better test performance. Left: Entropy of generated responses during RL training. Right: Test performance during RL training.
items.capZh: 图 21：消融实验 9 的结果。应用自适应熵控制防止了熵崩溃，从而带来更好的测试性能。左图：RL 训练期间生成响应的熵。右图：RL 训练期间的测试性能。

items.en: We tested a popular trick called clip-higher [34] used in PPO-style policy loss to prevent the entropy collapse when NSGD>1N_{\text{SGD}}>1. We conduct the following ablation experiments.
items.zh: 我们测试了一种称为 clip-higher [34] 的流行技巧，用于 PPO 风格策略损失中，以防止 NSGD>1N_{\text{SGD}}>1 时的熵崩溃。我们进行了以下消融实验。

items.en: Our results, shown in Figure 22, indicate that using a properly chosen higher-clip ratio – e.g., 0.25 or 0.265 – can prevent premature entropy collapse and lead to better test performance. However, it is worth noting that when the higher-clip ratio is set to 0.28, as suggested in [34], entropy increases sharply, resulting in poor test performance. This suggests that the optimal higher-clip ratio is task-dependent.
items.zh: 我们的结果（如图22所示）表明，使用适当选择的更高裁剪比率（例如0.25或0.265）可以防止熵过早崩溃，并带来更好的测试性能。然而，值得注意的是，当更高裁剪比率设置为0.28（如文献[34]所建议）时，熵急剧增加，导致测试性能较差。这表明最优的更高裁剪比率是任务相关的。

items.capEn: Figure 22: The results of Ablation Experiments 10. Increasing the higher-clip ratio to an adequate value (e.g., 0.25 and 0.265) yields slower convergence and better test performance. However, we find that when the higher-clip ratio is set to 0.28 as recommended in [34], then entropy rises sharply and test performance is not improved. Left: Entropy of generated responses during RL training. Right: Test performance during RL training.
items.capZh: 图22：消融实验10的结果。将更高裁剪比率增加到适当值（例如0.25和0.265）会带来更慢的收敛和更好的测试性能。然而，我们发现当更高裁剪比率设置为0.28（如文献[34]所推荐）时，熵急剧上升，测试性能并未改善。左图：强化学习训练过程中生成响应的熵。右图：强化学习训练过程中的测试性能。

full.sec: 5 Empirical Studies on Training Resource Allocation
full.secZh: 5 训练资源分配的实证研究

items.en: During the RL training process, our goal is to select hyperparameters that make training both efficient and effective. This objective gives rise to two practical questions:
items.zh: 在强化学习训练过程中，我们的目标是选择使训练既高效又有效的超参数。这一目标引出了两个实际问题：

items.en: Given fixed computational resources, how can we improve training efficiency?
items.zh: 在固定算力资源下，如何提高训练效率？

items.en: Given additional computational resources, how should we allocate them to achieve better test performance or improved training efficiency?
items.zh: 在额外算力资源下，应如何分配它们以获得更好的测试性能或更高的训练效率？

items.en: In this section, we address these questions in the context of long CoT scenarios, using results from exhaustive ablation experiments as supporting evidence. The training process of online RL algorithms can generally be divided into two distinct phases: data rollout and policy update (which includes both forward and backward passes). Let tRt_{R}, tTt_{T}, and tOt_{O} denote the time spent on rollout, policy update, and other operations (e.g., reward computation, experience generation), respectively. The total time consumption under a synchronous training framework is:
items.zh: 在本节中，我们基于详尽的消融实验结果，在长思维链场景下回答这些问题。在线强化学习算法的训练过程通常可分为两个不同阶段：数据展开和策略更新（包括前向和反向传播）。令 tR、tT 和 tO 分别表示展开、策略更新和其他操作（如奖励计算、经验生成）所花费的时间。在同步训练框架下，总时间消耗为：

items.en: Given a fixed context length, the rollout time tRt_{R} is primarily influenced by the rollout batch size DRD_{R} and the group size (g​sgs). As analyzed in Section 4.4, the policy update time tTt_{T} depends on the number of SGD steps NSGDN_{\text{SGD}}, which is determined by the number of mini-batches DRDT\frac{D_{R}}{D_{T}} and the data reuse factor NreuseN_{\text{reuse}}. In the following subsections, we investigate how these factors impact both training efficiency and final performance.
items.zh: 在固定上下文长度下，展开时间 tR 主要受展开批次大小 DR 和组大小 gs 的影响。如第4.4节所分析，策略更新时间 tT 取决于 SGD 步数 NSGD，而 NSGD 由小批量数量 DR/DT 和数据重用因子 Nreuse 决定。在以下小节中，我们研究这些因素如何影响训练效率和最终性能。

full.sec: 5.1 Improving Training Efficiency with Fixed Computational Resources
full.secZh: 5.1 固定计算资源下提高训练效率

items.en: In this section, we aim to answer the first question: Given fixed computational resources, how can training efficiency be improved?
items.zh: 在本节中，我们旨在回答第一个问题：在固定算力资源下，如何提高训练效率？

items.capEn: Figure 23: Overview of empirical studies on improving training efficiency given fixed computational resources. Grey‌ blocks: Potential approaches to enhance training efficiency and their underlying principles. Yellow blocks: Experimental variables in the empirical studies
items.capZh: 图23：关于在固定算力资源下提高训练效率的实证研究概览。灰色块：提高训练效率的潜在方法及其基本原理。黄色块：实证研究中的实验变量。

items.en: A fundamental observation regarding long CoT models (e.g. Deepseek-R1-Distill model series) is that the total training time is primarily determined by the rollout time. Table 7 presents the values of ttotalt_{\text{total}}, tRt_{R}, tTt_{T} and tOt_{O} of Skywork-OR1-32B over 1000 training steps. Clearly, tRt_{R} dominates ttotalt_{\text{total}}.
items.zh: 关于长思维链模型（例如 Deepseek-R1-Distill 模型系列）的一个基本观察是，总训练时间主要由展开时间决定。表7给出了 Skywork-OR1-32B 在1000个训练步骤中的 ttotal、tR、tT 和 tO 值。显然，tR 主导了 ttotal。

items.en: Since the primary bottleneck for ttotalt_{\text{total}} in long CoT training is tRt_{\text{R}}, it is reasonable to expect that appropriately increasing the number of SGD steps per training step, i.e., NSGDN_{\text{SGD}}, will have minimal impact on ttotalt_{\text{total}} while improving training efficiency. Therefore, in the following, we investigate the impact of the number of mini-batches (DRDT\frac{D_{R}}{D_{T}}) and the data reuse times (NreuseN_{\text{reuse}}) on both the total training time ttotalt_{\text{total}} and test performance. The overall idea of our study is illustrated in Figure 23.
items.zh: 由于长思维链训练中 ttotal 的主要瓶颈是 tR，因此可以合理预期，适当增加每个训练步骤的 SGD 步数（即 NSGD）将对 ttotal 影响最小，同时提高训练效率。因此，下面我们研究小批量数量（DR/DT）和数据重用次数（Nreuse）对总训练时间 ttotal 和测试性能的影响。我们研究的总体思路如图23所示。

items.en: We have already examined the impact of increasing NSGDN_{\text{SGD}} on entropy dynamics, as discussed in Ablation Experiments 6 (Section 4.4). Consider the configuration tuple (NSGD,DR,DT,Nreuse)(N_{\text{SGD}},D_{R},D_{T},N_{\text{reuse}}). We report the detailed time usage for the configurations (1, 64, 64, 1), (2, 64, 32, 1), and (4, 64, 16, 1) in Table 8. It is evident that increasing NSGDN_{\text{SGD}} leads to a higher tTt_{T}. However, the impact on the overall training time ttotalt_{\text{total}} remains minor, provided that DRD_{R} is fixed. Thus, the configurations with NSGD∈{2,4}N_{\text{SGD}}\in\{2,4\} perform multiple SGD steps within comparable training time, improving training efficiency. That said, the experimental results in Section 4.4 show that accelerating training via rollout batch decomposition or data reuse leads to faster entropy collapse and poorer test performance. Therefore, we do not recommend increasing NSGDN_{\text{SGD}} solely for the purpose of improving training efficiency – unless appropriate mechanisms are in place to mitigate entropy collapse, particularly those caused by off-policy updates – as doing so may result in degraded generalization performance.
items.zh: 我们已经考察了增加 NSGD 对熵动力学的影响，如消融实验6（第4.4节）所述。考虑配置元组 (NSGD, DR, DT, Nreuse)。我们在表8中报告了配置 (1, 64, 64, 1)、(2, 64, 32, 1) 和 (4, 64, 16, 1) 的详细时间使用情况。显然，增加 NSGD 会导致 tT 增加。然而，只要 DR 固定，对总训练时间 ttotal 的影响仍然很小。因此，NSGD ∈ {2,4} 的配置在可比的训练时间内执行多个 SGD 步骤，提高了训练效率。也就是说，第4.4节的实验结果表明，通过展开批次分解或数据重用加速训练会导致更快的熵崩溃和更差的测试性能。因此，我们不建议仅仅为了提高训练效率而增加 NSGD——除非有适当的机制来缓解熵崩溃，特别是由离策略更新引起的熵崩溃——因为这样做可能导致泛化性能下降。

full.sec: 5.2 Improving Test Performance with More Computational Resources
full.secZh: 5.2 增加计算资源提升测试性能

items.en: In this section, we address the second question: given more computational resources, how should training resources be allocated to achieve higher test performance or better training efficiency? Regarding training efficiency, two approaches may be considered. On the one hand, increasing the number of SGD steps – previously discussed – may seem promising. However, experimental findings do not support the effectiveness of this approach (see Section 5.1). On the other hand, under a fixed rollout budget (i.e., the number of samples to be rolled out), one might expect a significant reduction in rollout time tRt_{R} as training resources are scaled up. In practice, however, this expectation is not fully realized. Table 9
items.zh: 在本节中，我们回答第二个问题：在拥有更多算力资源的情况下，应如何分配训练资源以获得更高的测试性能或更好的训练效率？关于训练效率，可以考虑两种方法。一方面，增加 SGD 步数——之前讨论过——似乎很有希望。然而，实验结果并不支持这种方法的有效性（见第5.1节）。另一方面，在固定展开预算（即要展开的样本数量）下，随着训练资源的扩展，人们可能期望展开时间 tR 显著减少。然而，在实践中，这一期望并未完全实现。表9

items.en: shows the rollout time tRt_{R} for 1024 samples under varying training resources. Notably, as training resources increase, the reduction in tRt_{R} diminishes. This is because tRt_{R} is primarily determined by the batch size and the time required to generate the longest response. Once sufficient resources are available, further scaling does not significantly reduce the processing time dominated by the generation of the longest sample. Therefore, when additional training resources are available, a more effective strategy is to increase the rollout budget appropriately, such that the rollout time tRt_{R} remains roughly constant or increases only marginally. By leveraging a larger rollout buffer, more accurate gradient estimates can be obtained, which may improve training efficiency and enhance test performance. In the following, we focus on how the rollout budget – determined by the rollout batch size and group size – affects RL performance. The overall idea of these studies are illustrated in Figure 24
items.zh: 显示了在不同训练资源下1024个样本的展开时间 tR。值得注意的是，随着训练资源的增加，tR 的减少幅度变小。这是因为 tR 主要由批次大小和生成最长响应所需的时间决定。一旦资源充足，进一步扩展不会显著减少由最长样本生成主导的处理时间。因此，当有额外的训练资源可用时，更有效的策略是适当增加展开预算，使得展开时间 tR 大致保持不变或仅略有增加。通过利用更大的展开缓冲区，可以获得更准确的梯度估计，这可能会提高训练效率并增强测试性能。下面，我们重点研究展开预算——由展开批次大小和组大小决定——如何影响强化学习性能。这些研究的总体思路如图24所示。

items.capEn: Figure 24: Overview of empirical studies on the effect of an increased rollout budget when more training resources are available. Grey and green blocks: The motivation of the empirical studies. Yellow blocks: The experimental variables in the empirical studies.
items.capZh: 图24：当有更多训练资源可用时，关于增加展开预算效果的实证研究概览。灰色和绿色块：实证研究的动机。黄色块：实证研究中的实验变量。

items.en: To investigate how the rollout batch size DRD_{R} affects the training dynamics, we conducted the following ablation experiments.
items.zh: 为了研究展开批次大小 DR 如何影响训练动力学，我们进行了以下消融实验。

items.en: The results in Figure 25 indicate that increasing the rollout batch size DRD_{R} in accordance with available training resources can lead to better test performance with similar training time consumption.
items.zh: 图25中的结果表明，根据可用训练资源增加展开批次大小 DR 可以在相似的训练时间消耗下带来更好的测试性能。

items.capEn: Figure 25: Results of Ablation Experiments 11. Given more training resources, increasing the rollout budget by increasing DRD_{R} achieves better test performance with similar total training hours.
items.capZh: 图25：消融实验11的结果。给定更多训练资源，通过增加 DR 来增加展开预算，可以在相似的总训练时间内获得更好的测试性能。

items.en: To investigate how the group size affects the training dynamics, we conducted the following ablation experiments.
items.zh: 为了研究组大小如何影响训练动力学，我们进行了以下消融实验。

items.en: It can be observed from Figure 26, given more training resources, increasing rollout budget by increasing the group size can lead to a better test performance with similar total training hours.
items.zh: 从图26可以看出，给定更多训练资源，通过增加组大小来增加展开预算，可以在相似的总训练时间内获得更好的测试性能。

items.capEn: Figure 26: Results of Ablation Experiments 12. Given more training resources, increasing rollout budget by increasing the group size can achieve better test performance with similar total training hours.
items.capZh: 图26：消融实验12的结果。给定更多训练资源时，通过增加组大小来增加rollout预算，可以在相似的总训练时长下获得更好的测试性能。

items.en: In this section, we introduce the processing pipeline for our RL training data.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们介绍强化学习训练数据的处理流程。

items.en: For the math domain, we primarily focus on NuminaMath-1.5 [13], a comprehensive dataset containing 896K math problems drawn from widely used sources and advanced mathematical topics. Although the dataset is sufficiently large, its quality requires careful examination prior to use.
items.zh: 对于数学领域，我们主要关注NuminaMath-1.5 [13]，这是一个包含896K数学问题的综合数据集，问题来自广泛使用的来源和高级数学主题。尽管数据集足够大，但其质量在使用前需要仔细检查。

items.en: For the code domain, we find that data source options are more limited, and the overall difficulty of available datasets is generally low relative to the capabilities of current models. In our pilot studies, we experimented with several popular datasets – including CODE-RL [12], TACO [14], and the Eurus-RL collection [2] – in their original mixtures, but obtained unsatisfactory results.
items.zh: 对于代码领域，我们发现数据源选择更为有限，且现有数据集的整体难度相对于当前模型的能力普遍较低。在我们的初步研究中，我们尝试了几种流行的数据集——包括CODE-RL [12]、TACO [14]和Eurus-RL集合 [2]——的原始混合，但结果不令人满意。

items.en: To select and curate high-quality data for RL, we adhere to the following general criteria for both data domains:
items.zh: 为了选择和整理用于强化学习的高质量数据，我们遵循以下两个数据领域通用的标准：

items.en: Verifiable: We exclude problems that cannot be verified, such as proof-based problems and code problems lacking test cases.
items.zh: 可验证：我们排除无法验证的问题，例如基于证明的问题和缺乏测试用例的代码问题。

items.en: Correct: We filter out math problems with invalid or incorrect answers, as well as code problems without comprehensive test cases.
items.zh: 正确：我们过滤掉答案无效或错误的数学问题，以及没有全面测试用例的代码问题。

items.en: Challenging: We pre-filter problems for which all N generations from the base model are either entirely correct or entirely incorrect.
items.zh: 有挑战性：我们预先过滤掉基础模型的所有N次生成要么完全正确要么完全错误的问题。

items.en: Following these criteria, we incorporate challenging problems from NuminaMath-1.5 and other sources to enhance problem difficulty and diversity in our data mixture: 1) NuminaMath-1.5 subsets: amc aime, olympiads, olympiads ref, aops forum, cn contest, inequalities, and number theory. 2) DeepScaleR. 3) STILL-3-Preview-RL-Data. 4) Omni-MATH. 5) AIME problems prior to 2024. For the code data mixture, we primarily consider problems from the following two sources, which offer sufficiently challenging coding questions: 1) LeetCode problems [30]. 2) TACO [15].
items.zh: 遵循这些标准，我们从NuminaMath-1.5和其他来源中纳入有挑战性的问题，以增强数据混合中的问题难度和多样性：1) NuminaMath-1.5子集：amc aime、olympiads、olympiads ref、aops forum、cn contest、inequalities和number theory。2) DeepScaleR。3) STILL-3-Preview-RL-Data。4) Omni-MATH。5) 2024年之前的AIME问题。对于代码数据混合，我们主要考虑来自以下两个来源的问题，它们提供了足够有挑战性的编程问题：1) LeetCode问题 [30]。2) TACO [15]。

items.en: For both math and coding problems, we first perform in-dataset deduplication to eliminate redundancy. For all collected math problems:
items.zh: 对于数学和编程问题，我们首先进行数据集内去重以消除冗余。对于所有收集到的数学问题：

items.en: We use Math-Verify [11] to re-extract answers from the provided textual solutions and retain only those problems where the extracted answer matches the corresponding answer in the dataset.
items.zh: 我们使用Math-Verify [11]从提供的文本解答中重新提取答案，并仅保留提取答案与数据集中对应答案匹配的问题。

items.en: We remove all instances that contain external URLs or potential figures in the problem statement.
items.zh: 我们移除所有问题陈述中包含外部URL或潜在图形的问题。

items.en: We then perform cross-dataset deduplication to eliminate potentially duplicated problems from similar sources and decontaminate against AIME24 and AIME25 problems, following DeepScaleR’s deduplication scheme.
items.zh: 然后我们进行跨数据集去重，以消除来自相似来源的潜在重复问题，并按照DeepScaleR的去重方案对AIME24和AIME25问题进行去污染处理。

items.en: This process yields approximately 105K math problems. For coding problems, we apply a more rigorous filtering process as follows:
items.zh: 这个过程产生了大约105K个数学问题。对于编程问题，我们应用更严格的过滤流程如下：

items.en: We discard samples with empty, incomplete, or corrupted original unit test cases.
items.zh: 我们丢弃原始单元测试用例为空、不完整或损坏的样本。

items.en: We programmatically verify all test cases using the provided original solutions. A sample is marked as valid only if the solution passes all corresponding test cases perfectly.
items.zh: 我们使用提供的原始解决方案以编程方式验证所有测试用例。仅当解决方案完美通过所有相应测试用例时，样本才被视为有效。

items.en: We conduct extensive deduplication based on embedding similarity across the collected coding problems, as many share the same problem with only slight variations in instructions.
items.zh: 我们基于收集到的编程问题之间的嵌入相似性进行广泛去重，因为许多问题共享相同的问题，仅在指令上有细微变化。

items.en: This results in a total of 13.7K coding questions (2.7K from LeetCode and 11K from TACO) in the final dataset.
items.zh: 这导致最终数据集中共有13.7K个编程问题（2.7K来自LeetCode，11K来自TACO）。

items.en: Due to the zero-advantage in GRPO when all sampled responses are either entirely correct or entirely incorrect within a group, we conduct an initial offline difficulty estimation for each problem relative to the models being trained. Specifically, for each problem, we perform N=16 rollouts for math problems and N=8 for coding questions using a temperature of 1.0 and a maximum token length of 32K, and use the percentage of correct solutions as a proxy for problem difficulty with respect to a given model. After verifying the correctness of the sampled solutions, we exclude problems with 0/N (all incorrect) or N/N (all correct) rollouts. We report the percentage statistics of discarded and retained math/code problems for both the 7B and 32B models as follows:
items.zh: 由于在GRPO中，当组内所有采样响应要么完全正确要么完全错误时优势为零，我们针对每个问题相对于正在训练的模型进行初始离线难度估计。具体来说，对于每个问题，我们对数学问题进行N=16次rollout，对编程问题进行N=8次rollout，使用温度1.0和最大token长度32K，并将正确解决方案的百分比作为问题相对于给定模型的难度代理。在验证采样解决方案的正确性后，我们排除rollout结果为0/N（全部错误）或N/N（全部正确）的问题。我们报告了7B和32B模型丢弃和保留的数学/编程问题的百分比统计如下：

full.sec: 6.3 Quality Assessment via Human and LLM-as-a-Judge
full.secZh: 6.3 通过人类和LLM作为评判者的质量评估

items.en: During the data processing stage, we identified that many problems in the math portion were either incomplete or poorly formatted. Consequently, we conducted an additional round of strict human-LLM-combined inspection to ensure data quality. We sampled a few hundred questions from the remaining pool and asked human evaluators to assess whether each problem met the following criteria:
items.zh: 在数据处理阶段，我们发现数学部分中的许多问题要么不完整，要么格式不佳。因此，我们进行了额外一轮严格的人工-LLM结合检查以确保数据质量。我们从剩余池中抽样了几百个问题，并要求人类评估者评估每个问题是否满足以下标准：

items.en: Clear Wording: Is the problem stated in a way that is easy to understand?
items.zh: 清晰表述：问题是否以易于理解的方式陈述？

items.en: Complete Information: Does the problem provide all necessary details?
items.zh: 信息完整：问题是否提供了所有必要的细节？

items.en: Good Formatting: Are the numbers, symbols, and equations clear and appropriately formatted?
items.zh: 格式良好：数字、符号和方程是否清晰且格式恰当？

items.en: No Distractions: Is the problem free of irrelevant information?
items.zh: 无干扰：问题是否不含无关信息？

items.zh: 下面我们提供了一些原始问题陈述的示例，这些示例被人类评估者认定为有问题：

items.en: Interestingly, these problems passed the difficulty estimation procedure (i.e., a model can produce a correct answer even when the problem is invalid or incomplete). This indicates that the models answered these problems correctly at least once during the 16 rollouts, suggesting they may have been trained on similar examples or that the answers were trivially guessable.
items.zh: 有趣的是，这些问题通过了难度估计流程（即，即使问题无效或不完整，模型也能产生正确答案）。这表明模型在16次展开中至少有一次正确回答了这些问题，暗示它们可能已在类似示例上训练过，或者答案可以轻易猜测。

items.en: To efficiently curate the entire dataset, we employed Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct and Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct to automatically filter out low-quality problems. Each model was prompted to evaluate a given math problem based on clarity, completeness, formatting, and relevance, and to identify reasons a problem might be considered low quality, ultimately providing a binary rating. This process mimics human assessment while being significantly more efficient. For each problem and each LLM judge, we collected 16 evaluations, resulting in a total of 32 votes per problem. We retained problems that received at least 9 valid votes and removed approximately 1K-2K math questions in total.
items.zh: 为了高效整理整个数据集，我们使用Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct和Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct自动过滤低质量问题。每个模型被提示根据清晰度、完整性、格式和相关性评估给定的数学问题，并识别问题可能被视为低质量的原因，最终给出二元评级。此过程模拟人类评估，同时效率显著提高。对于每个问题和每个LLM评判员，我们收集了16次评估，每个问题共获得32票。我们保留了至少获得9张有效票的问题，总共移除了约1K-2K个数学问题。

items.en: During the initial stage of all experiments on math reasoning, we conducted several preliminary analyses of the rule-based math verifiers available at the time. These verifiers included:
items.zh: 在数学推理所有实验的初始阶段，我们对当时可用的基于规则的数学验证器进行了若干初步分析。这些验证器包括：

items.en: The original MATH verifier (verl version)
items.zh: 原始MATH验证器（verl版本）

items.en: We first sampled a small set of problems along with their associated solutions and answers, and manually examined the quality of their parsers and verifiers. We found that the Qwen2.5 verifier tends to lose information during the parsing process (e.g., when parsing \boxed{aˆ2}} $, it fails to retain ˆ2). We also observed that the PRIME verifier can occasionally stall during execution. As a result, we excluded these two verifiers from further analysis.
items.zh: 我们首先抽样了一小部分问题及其相关解答和答案，并手动检查了其解析器和验证器的质量。我们发现Qwen2.5验证器在解析过程中容易丢失信息（例如，解析\boxed{aˆ2}}时，无法保留ˆ2）。我们还观察到PRIME验证器偶尔会在执行过程中停滞。因此，我们将这两个验证器排除在进一步分析之外。

items.en: We then used rollout data from the difficulty estimation procedure and applied the remaining verifiers to evaluate the generated solutions. We plotted the number of problems at each difficulty level (0–8) in Figure 27:
items.zh: 然后，我们使用难度估计流程的展开数据，并应用剩余的验证器来评估生成的解答。我们在图27中绘制了每个难度级别（0-8）的问题数量：

items.capEn: Figure 27: Distributions of the number of correct rollouts from DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B, obtained using four different verifiers on a subset of NuminaMath-1.5 problems. The numbers 0–8 indicate difficulty levels. The size of each sector represents the number of problems at a specific difficulty level.
items.capZh: 图27：使用四种不同验证器在NuminaMath-1.5问题子集上，DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B正确展开次数的分布。数字0-8表示难度级别。每个扇区的大小代表特定难度级别的问题数量。

items.en: Based on a combination of verifier results and human judgments, we observed the following:
items.zh: 基于验证器结果和人类判断的组合，我们观察到以下情况：

items.en: Both the original MATH verifier (verl version) and DeepScaleR’s verifier produced higher rates of false positives and false negatives.
items.zh: 原始MATH验证器（verl版本）和DeepScaleR的验证器都产生了较高的假阳性和假阴性率。

items.en: For Math-Verify, some implementation details changed as we explored different versions. Therefore, we include both version 0.5.2 and the default version (0.6.0), which we extensively used in model development, noting only trivial differences between them.
items.zh: 对于Math-Verify，随着我们探索不同版本，一些实现细节发生了变化。因此，我们同时包含了版本0.5.2和默认版本（0.6.0），后者在模型开发中被广泛使用，注意到两者之间只有微小差异。

items.en: Note that Math-Verify may still yield incorrect results for solutions with non-standard formatting or mathematical expressions it does not support (e.g., problems with multiple answers).
items.zh: 请注意，对于格式非标准或包含其不支持的数学表达式（例如，有多个答案的问题）的解答，Math-Verify仍可能产生错误结果。

items.en: In our final implementation of the reward function, we verify whether the answer in a text solution is correct using the following steps:
items.zh: 在我们最终的奖励函数实现中，我们通过以下步骤验证文本解答中的答案是否正确：

items.en: Extract the answer that appears after the reasoning process.
items.zh: 提取推理过程后出现的答案。

items.en: Use Math-Verify’s parser to parse the answer and obtain its string representation.
items.zh: 使用Math-Verify的解析器解析答案并获取其字符串表示。

items.en: If the string representation directly matches the gold answer, return True; otherwise, fall back to Math-Verify’s verify function.
items.zh: 如果字符串表示直接匹配标准答案，返回True；否则，回退到Math-Verify的verify函数。

items.en: Wrap the gold answer in boxed​{}\text{\\ }\text{boxed}\{\} and run the verification to obtain the final result.
items.zh: 将黄金答案用 \boxed{} 包裹并运行验证以获得最终结果。

items.en: We find that wrapping the gold answer with boxed​{}\text{\\ }\text{boxed}\{\} is a crucial step. Parsing the gold answer directly can alter the mathematical expression.
items.zh: 我们发现用 \boxed{} 包裹黄金答案是一个关键步骤。直接解析黄金答案可能会改变数学表达式。

items.en: For unit test execution, we constructed a highly efficient and secure local code sandbox based on LiveCodeBench’s implementation, leveraging subprocess processing. This sandbox supports various testing methods, including standard input-output testing, solution function unit testing, and assertion-based tests. To further enhance its security and robustness, we implemented the following measures:
items.zh: 对于单元测试执行，我们基于 LiveCodeBench 的实现构建了一个高效且安全的本地代码沙箱，利用子进程处理。该沙箱支持多种测试方法，包括标准输入输出测试、解决方案函数单元测试和基于断言的测试。为了进一步增强其安全性和鲁棒性，我们实施了以下措施：

items.en: Syntax validation: We first validate submitted solutions using Abstract Syntax Trees (AST). If syntax errors are detected, the sandbox immediately terminates the test and returns False.
items.zh: 语法验证：我们首先使用抽象语法树（AST）验证提交的解决方案。如果检测到语法错误，沙箱立即终止测试并返回 False。

items.en: Memory monitoring: During training, we identified potential memory leak risks in some generated solutions. To mitigate this, we integrated a memory monitoring mechanism for each test process. If a process exceeds 50GB of memory usage, the sandbox proactively terminates the test and returns False, effectively preventing resource exhaustion.
items.zh: 内存监控：在训练过程中，我们发现一些生成的解决方案存在潜在的内存泄漏风险。为了缓解这一问题，我们为每个测试进程集成了内存监控机制。如果某个进程的内存使用超过 50GB，沙箱会主动终止测试并返回 False，有效防止资源耗尽。

items.en: Parallel stability optimization: Initially, we used asynchronous testing combined with process pools for parallel execution. However, we later discovered that the sandbox could crash under this setup, leading to incorrect test results. To resolve this, we revised our approach to rely solely on multiprocessing, ensuring stable and efficient parallel execution.
items.zh: 并行稳定性优化：最初，我们使用异步测试结合进程池进行并行执行。然而，后来发现沙箱在这种设置下可能崩溃，导致错误的测试结果。为了解决这个问题，我们修改了方法，仅依赖多进程处理，确保稳定高效的并行执行。

items.en: Additionally, we conducted a performance comparison between our sandbox and the PRIME sandbox. The results demonstrate the superior effectiveness of our implementation on specific datasets. Notably, the PRIME sandbox occasionally misclassified correct solutions as failures, whereas our sandbox more accurately evaluated solution correctness.
items.zh: 此外，我们对我们的沙箱和 PRIME 沙箱进行了性能比较。结果表明，我们的实现在特定数据集上具有更优的效果。值得注意的是，PRIME 沙箱偶尔会将正确的解决方案误判为失败，而我们的沙箱能更准确地评估解决方案的正确性。

items.en: It is also important to note a limitation of our sandbox identified during practical usage: it does not currently handle cases where the same input can yield multiple valid outputs. Such cases are common in real-world code testing scenarios involving non-deterministic or open-ended problems.
items.zh: 还需要注意我们在实际使用中发现的一个沙箱局限性：它目前无法处理同一输入可能产生多个有效输出的情况。这类情况在涉及非确定性或开放问题的实际代码测试场景中很常见。

items.en: In this section, we present the experimental results of our three models: Skywork-OR1-Math-7B, Skywork-OR1-7B, and Skywork-OR1-32B. We begin with the details of the training configurations, followed by an analysis of the training results. Finally, we discuss the evaluation outcomes.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们展示三个模型：Skywork-OR1-Math-7B、Skywork-OR1-7B 和 Skywork-OR1-32B 的实验结果。我们首先介绍训练配置的细节，然后分析训练结果，最后讨论评估结果。

items.en: Below, we describe the training configurations of our Skywork models. The 7B and 32B models are fine-tuned based on DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B and DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-32B, respectively. We collect math and code problems from various sources and apply comprehensive preprocessing, difficulty filtering, and quality control. This ensures a problem mixture that is verifiable, valid, and challenging. See Section 6 for details. Based on this curated mixture, all three models are fine-tuned by optimizing the policy loss (3.1) with a constant learning rate of 1e-6, clip ratio of 0.2, target entropy of 0.2, sampling temperature of 1.0, and rejection sampling. Notably, we do not apply any KL loss in our training process, as discussed in Section 3.2.6. Please refer to Section 3.1 for more details on the policy update procedure. All experiments use multi-stage training. We report the detailed configuration for each training stage in Table 10, Table 11, and Table 12. The released checkpoints correspond to step 2160 for Skywork-OR1-Math-7B, step 1320 for Skywork-OR1-7B, and step 1000 for Skywork-OR1-32B.
items.zh: 下面，我们描述 Skywork 模型的训练配置。7B 和 32B 模型分别基于 DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B 和 DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-32B 进行微调。我们从多个来源收集数学和编程问题，并进行全面的预处理、难度过滤和质量控制。这确保了问题混合集是可验证、有效且具有挑战性的。详见第 6 节。基于这个精心策划的混合集，所有三个模型通过优化策略损失（3.1）进行微调，使用恒定的学习率 1e-6、裁剪比率 0.2、目标熵 0.2、采样温度 1.0 和拒绝采样。值得注意的是，我们在训练过程中没有应用任何 KL 损失，如第 3.2.6 节所述。有关策略更新过程的更多细节，请参考第 3.1 节。所有实验都使用多阶段训练。我们在表 10、表 11 和表 12 中报告了每个训练阶段的详细配置。发布的检查点对应 Skywork-OR1-Math-7B 的第 2160 步、Skywork-OR1-7B 的第 1320 步和 Skywork-OR1-32B 的第 1000 步。

items.en: We evaluate our models on challenging benchmarks. For math capabilities, we assess performance on the American Invitational Mathematics Examination (AIME) 2024 and 2025. For coding capabilities, we use LiveCodeBench [10] (from 2024-08 to 2025-02). We compare against several strong baselines, including DeepSeek-R1 [3], Qwen3-32B [32], QwQ-32B [25], Light-R1-32B [29], TinyR1-32B-Preview [27], and several 7B RL models based on DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B, such as AceReason-Nemotron-7B [1], AReaL-boba-RL-7B [18], and Light-R1-7B-DS [29].
items.zh: 我们在具有挑战性的基准上评估我们的模型。对于数学能力，我们评估了美国邀请数学考试（AIME）2024 和 2025 的性能。对于编程能力，我们使用 LiveCodeBench [10]（从 2024-08 到 2025-02）。我们与几个强大的基线模型进行比较，包括 DeepSeek-R1 [3]、Qwen3-32B [32]、QwQ-32B [25]、Light-R1-32B [29]、TinyR1-32B-Preview [27]，以及几个基于 DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B 的 7B 强化学习模型，如 AceReason-Nemotron-7B [1]、AReaL-boba-RL-7B [18] 和 Light-R1-7B-DS [29]。

items.en: We set the maximum generation length to 32,768 tokens for all models. For AIME24/25, we report avg@32 performance; for LiveCodeBench (2024-08 to 2025-02), we report avg@4 performance. Responses are generated using a temperature of 1 and top-p of 1. The avg@nn metric is defined as

items.zh: 其中 x 是评估问题，y_i 是第 i 个响应。

items.en: As shown in Table 13, Skywork-OR1 models achieve significant improvements over their base SFT models (e.g., the DeepSeek-R1-Distill series). Specifically, Skywork-OR1-32B achieves scores of 82.2 on AIME24, 73.3 on AIME25, and 63.0 on LiveCodeBench, outperforming strong contemporary models such as DeepSeek-R1 and Qwen3-32B on key math benchmarks, setting new SOTA records at the time of release. Skywork-OR1-7B scores 70.2 on AIME24, 54.6 on AIME25, and 47.6 on LiveCodeBench, demonstrating competitive performance relative to similarly sized models across both math and coding tasks. Our earlier released model, Skywork-OR1-Math-7B, also delivers competitive results among models of similar size, scoring 69.8 on AIME24, 52.3 on AIME25, and 43.6 on LiveCodeBench. These SOTA results are especially noteworthy given that they are obtained through fine-tuning the DeepSeek-R1-Distill series – SFT base models with relatively modest initial performance – clearly demonstrating the substantial impact of our pipeline.
items.zh: 如表 13 所示，Skywork-OR1 模型相对于其基础 SFT 模型（例如 DeepSeek-R1-Distill 系列）取得了显著改进。具体来说，Skywork-OR1-32B 在 AIME24 上达到 82.2，在 AIME25 上达到 73.3，在 LiveCodeBench 上达到 63.0，在关键数学基准上优于 DeepSeek-R1 和 Qwen3-32B 等当代强模型，在发布时创下了新的 SOTA 记录。Skywork-OR1-7B 在 AIME24 上得分为 70.2，在 AIME25 上为 54.6，在 LiveCodeBench 上为 47.6，在数学和编程任务上相对于类似规模的模型展示了有竞争力的性能。我们早期发布的模型 Skywork-OR1-Math-7B 在类似规模的模型中也取得了有竞争力的结果，在 AIME24 上得分为 69.8，在 AIME25 上为 52.3，在 LiveCodeBench 上为 43.6。这些 SOTA 结果尤其值得注意，因为它们是通过对 DeepSeek-R1-Distill 系列（初始性能相对适中的 SFT 基础模型）进行微调获得的，清楚地展示了我们流程的巨大影响。

items.en: In this work, we present Skywork-OR1, an effective and scalable reinforcement learning (RL) implementation for enhancing the reasoning capabilities of long CoT models. Building upon the DeepSeek-R1-Distill model series, our RL approach achieves significant performance improvements on various mathematical and coding benchmarks. The Skywork-OR1-32B model outperforms both DeepSeek-R1 and Qwen3-32B on AIME24 and AIME25, while delivering comparable results on LiveCodeBench. Additionally, the Skywork-OR1-7B and Skywork-OR1-Math-7B models demonstrate competitive reasoning performance among similarly sized models. Our comprehensive ablation studies validate the effectiveness of the core components in our training pipeline, including data mixture and filtration, multi-stage training without advantage masking, high-temperature sampling, exclusion of KL loss, and adaptive entropy control. We conduct extensive investigations into entropy collapse phenomena, identifying key factors that influence entropy dynamics. Our findings show that preventing premature entropy collapse is critical for achieving optimal test performance, offering valuable insights for future research and development. Furthermore, we explore how different training resource allocations affect both training efficiency and final model performance.
items.zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了 Skywork-OR1，一种有效且可扩展的强化学习（RL）实现，用于增强长思维链模型的推理能力。基于 DeepSeek-R1-Distill 模型系列，我们的 RL 方法在多个数学和编程基准上取得了显著的性能提升。Skywork-OR1-32B 模型在 AIME24 和 AIME25 上优于 DeepSeek-R1 和 Qwen3-32B，同时在 LiveCodeBench 上取得了可比的结果。此外，Skywork-OR1-7B 和 Skywork-OR1-Math-7B 模型在类似规模的模型中展示了有竞争力的推理性能。我们全面的消融研究验证了训练流程中核心组件的有效性，包括数据混合与过滤、无优势掩码的多阶段训练、高温采样、排除 KL 损失以及自适应熵控制。我们对熵崩溃现象进行了广泛研究，识别出影响熵动态的关键因素。我们的发现表明，防止过早的熵崩溃对于实现最佳测试性能至关重要，为未来的研究和发展提供了宝贵的见解。此外，我们探讨了不同的训练资源分配如何影响训练效率和最终模型性能。
